runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W6W) Sat midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W6W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Sat in front of midfield, traveled nicely, slightly weakened passing the 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居中間之前位置。走勢良佳。跑過二百米處時略為轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W2W) Began well from gate 10, raced 3 wide behind midfield, sent forward after passing 850M, took the lead near 600M, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challengers.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W2W) 自第十檔出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，走第三疊。跑過八百五十米處後受催策上前。接近六百米處時取得領先。入直路時領先半個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，力拒對手的挑戰勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (3W2W2W1W) Away well, positioned 2 wide, a length or so back, found rail near 550M, 1-1/2L back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(3W2W2W1W) 出閘迅速，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。接近五百五十米處時移入內欄。入直路時落後一個半馬位，直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W4W) Sluggish start, three-wide without cover throughout, good headway on final bend, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W4W) 出閘緩慢，沿途走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎追前甚多。保持走勢，但速度不足以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Mid-field, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，自四百米處起受催策，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W7W) Settled behind midfield 3 wide, stayed on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W7W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。保持普通走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W3W3W) Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the inside early, angled out after entering the back straight, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W3W3W) 與對手同步躍出，早段居後列，走內疊。進入對面直路後向外移出。入直路時落後七至八個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W4W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield early, 3 wide after entering the back straight, moved closer after passing 900M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 出閘普通，早段居中間位置，走第二疊。進入對面直路後走第三疊。跑過九百米處後追近。入直路時落後約兩個馬位，直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W5W) Jumped only fairly, raced 3 wide behind midfield, hard ridden after passing 550M, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第三疊。跑過五百五十米處後受力策。入直路時走大外疊。直路上毫無表現。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W1W1W) Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, finished off well to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W1W1W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎沿欄略為追近。衝刺良佳，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (2W2W3W5W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(2W2W3W5W) 自外檔出閘後留居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, challenged up rail from top of home straight, ran on well final 200m to lead close home and just prevailed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。自直路初起沿欄展開挑戰。最後二百米以佳勢上前，接近終點時取得領先，險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Out with rest, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Crowded shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段對催策反應平平。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘普通，居中間位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎居相若位置。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Crowded at start, never better than midfield, one paced under pressure in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 起步時受擠迫，從未超越中間位置。直路上在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Sat off midfield 2 wide, never a threat. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。從未能構成威脅。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W3W) Travelled keenly in first few, over 2L back in 4th in back straight, came under pressure approaching final turn, found no extra when inconvenienced over 150M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 搶口，居首數位之內。對面直路上居第四位，落後逾兩個馬位。趨近直路彎時受催策。一百五十米處受妨礙，再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W3W) Sat in front of midfield, angled out making the Turn, one pace to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W3W) 居中間之前位置。轉直路彎時向外移出。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W1W1W1W1W) Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, headed 250M, kept on well until approaching 50M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W1W1W1W1W) 出閘普通，受催策上前領放。入直路時受對手挑戰。二百五十米處被超越，保持佳勢直至趨近五十米處。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Bumped shortly after start, raced prominently, 2 wide, challenged the leader 600M, kept on well in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居前列，走第二疊。六百米處挑戰領放馬。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W4W) Jumped awkwardly, sat rear, failed to respond under whip (See Incident Report).
(Blood at the right nostril.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘笨拙，居後列。對鞭策毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）
（右邊鼻孔有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, one-paced thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路初未能再增速。其後保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Settled midfield, one pace to the finish (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置。保持同速至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Sat on pace 3 wide, weakened and faded in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走第三疊。直路上轉弱及力竭。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Sat midfield 2 wide, made little impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W1W1W1W1W) Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, under pressure 500m out, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。五百米處受催策，未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 起步時觸碰對手，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths back on turn, angled out after passing 400M, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路彎落後六個馬位。跑過四百米處後向外移出。直路初未能再加速。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced towards rear of midfield, 2 wide, closer on turn, made some progress in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路彎追近。直路上略為追前，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W3W3W) Held up, outpaced and detached final bend, never competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W3W3W) 留後。直路彎被拋離。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W2W4W) Sat towards the rear 2 wide, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W2W4W) 居後列，走第二疊。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (1W1W) Average to begin, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, failed to make any progress thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘一般，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空。跑過三百米處後望空，其後毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Bumped and lost balance out of stalls, tracked leaders against rail, switched for clear run 500m out, dropped away quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 出閘時被碰撞及失去平衡，跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。五百米處轉換跑線以望空。末段迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W3W) Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside early, moved closer after passing 1250M, positioned 3 wide, a length or so back in the middle stages, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W3W) 與對手同步出閘，早段居中間位置，走外疊。跑過一千二百五十米處後追近。中段落後約一個馬位，走第三疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再加速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Waited with towards rear, short of room early in home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初空位不足。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Raced prominently, three wide, weakened 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走第三疊。三百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, dropped to midfield on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 起步後不久與對手互相觸碰，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎墮居中間位置。直路初未能再增速，最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W2W2W) Moderately away from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 1100M, 2nd in the middle stages, outpaced early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走外疊。跑過千一米處後略為追近。中段居第二位。直路早段被拋離。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped well from a wide draw, taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, 4-1/2L back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，留居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後四個半馬位。直路上未能以勁勢衝刺。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W3W) Dropped out from widest draw, three wide without cover, hung in final 200m, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W3W) 自最外檔出閘，墮後，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。最後二百米內閃。保持走勢，但未能加速以追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Raced wide towards rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時受推策，走外疊。未能增速以展開挑戰。最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Jumped only fairly, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，落後約六個馬位，走外疊。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W3W) Keen in mid-field, driven 500m out, no real impression, held when checked 50m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居中間位置，搶口。五百米處受催策。毫無表現，五十米處受困時勒避。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, under pressure top of home straight, never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路初受催策。從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Held up last, still in last place top of home straight, never going pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。從未能加速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W2W3W3W) Bumped shortly after start, mid division, keen early, tried to follow winner through 900m out but failed to respond, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W2W3W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，早段搶口。九百米處嘗試跟隨頭馬上前，但對催策毫無反應。大敗而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W2W5W) Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield, 2 wide, angled out after passing 550M, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W2W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過五百五十米處後向外移出。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路初未能再增速，末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Began well, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上對催策反應平平。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W3W4W) Settled midfield, gave ground rounding the Turn, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W3W4W) 居中間位置。轉直路彎時墮退。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield on rail, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。入直路後保持走內疊，末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W4W) Bumped out of stalls, three wide in mid-field without cover, pushed along 500m out, weakened final 250m, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W4W) 出閘時發生碰撞，居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。五百米處受推策。最後二百五十米轉弱，遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 400M, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, inclined to hang in early in straight, short of rom final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 自外檔出閘後留後，居後列，走內疊。四百米處向外移出。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路初傾向內閃，最後一百五十米空位不足。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped with them, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持佳勢，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W2W) Bumped shortly after start, rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 900m out, clear run 200m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W2W) 起步後不久被碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。九百米處移離內欄。二百米處望空。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Settled worse than midfield, failed to respond (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 居中間之後位置。對催策毫無反應。（表現難以接受。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W) Waited with towards rear, briefly short of room up rail early part of home straight, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W) 居後列，留力候上。直路早段一度空位不足，走內欄。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W3W6W) In rear after shifted out at start, switched wide and briefly hampered 750m out, commenced move out wide 500m out, stayed on but unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W3W6W) 起步時向外斜跑，居後列。七百五十米處移出外疊，一度受阻礙。五百米處開始發力，走外疊。末段保持走勢，但未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W2W) Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 350M, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W2W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。三百五十米處向外移出。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W3W5W) Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W3W5W) 出閘普通，居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W3W) Settled in rear of mid-field, short-lived challenge early in home straight, no match for leaders, stayed on for a clear third.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W3W) 居中間之後位置。直路初一度發力展開挑戰，但未能與領先馬匹抗衡。保持走勢，在帶離餘駒下跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Slightly slow out and crowded, raced towards rear on the inside, angled out after passing 700M, 5 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 出閘稍慢及受擠迫，居後列，走內疊。跑過七百米處後向外移出。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，落後領放馬一個半馬位，走內疊。直路彎居相同位置。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間位置，走內疊。轉入直路時落後兩至三個馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W1W1W1W1W3W) Jumped well, raced slightly better than midfield on rail in the early stages, dropped to midfield 1300M, 3Ls or so back in the middle stages, angled out approaching 400M, finished off well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W1W3W) 出閘迅速，早段居中間稍前位置，走內欄。千三米處墮居中間位置，中段落後約三個馬位。趨近四百米處時向外移出，末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W3W) Shifted in shortly after start and made contact, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 起步後不久向內斜跑，與對手互相觸碰，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時走較外疊，衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍，未能構成威脅。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約五個馬位。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W4W4W) Waited with towards rear, forced to steady off heels 800m out, pushed along widest into home straight, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W4W4W) 居後列，留力候上。八百米處被迫收慢避開他駒後蹄。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W1W2W2W) Hampered shortly after start, raced at rear on the inside, 2 wide from 700M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight, crowded close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W1W2W2W) 起步後不久受阻礙，居包尾位置，走內疊。自七百米處起走第二疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上追前甚多。接近終點時受擠迫。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W3W) Moderately away from the widest draw, raced slightly behind midfield, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W3W) 自最外檔出閘普通，居中間稍後位置。入直路時走大外疊。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W1W1W2W) Taken back from gate 11, raced towards rear on the inside, 2 wide turning in, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W1W1W2W) 自第十一檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。轉入直路時走第二疊。直路初向外移出。衝刺強勁，跑獲季軍。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W2W2W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, moved closer after passing 1100M, raced prominently in the middle stages, peaked 400M, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W2W2W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。跑過千一米處後追近，中段居前列。四百米處未能再增速，最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W2W2W1W) Dropped out from wide draw, held up last, ridden along 800m out, passed plenty of field up rail in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W2W2W1W) 自外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。八百米處受催策。直路上沿欄超越多駒。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W3W) Slightly slow out and made contact, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W3W) 出閘稍慢及發生觸碰，居後列，走內疊。五百五十米處向外移出。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路上超越部分已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W3W5W) Out in line, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, wider turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W3W5W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時走較外疊。直路上未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Bumped start, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until approaching final 100M, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。未能望空直至趨近一百米處。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W3W) Rear of mid-field, under pressure turning into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W3W) 居中間之後位置。轉入直路時受催策。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider after passing 700M, 2-1/2L back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 250M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 起步時發生觸碰，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過七百米處後走較外疊。入直路時落後兩個半馬位。直路初未能望空。二百五十米處望空。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Knuckled on jumping, taken back to race at tail, still last turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 躍出時俯首前跪，留居包尾位置。入直路時仍居包尾位置。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W3W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間位置，落後約四個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Jumped well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide better than midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第三疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, no clear run until final furlong, closed off fairly afterwards.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。未能望空直至二百米處，其後衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W2W3W) Blundered on jumping, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 1100M, 1 out 1 back on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W2W3W) 躍出時失蹄，居第二位，走第二疊。接近千一米處時讓對手過頭。直路彎居第二疊第二位。直路初保持佳勢。二百米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W3W4W) Out with rest, raced towards rear on the inside, commenced move 550M, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居後列，走內疊。五百五十米處開始上前。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前甚多，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Settled in front of midfield, crowded at the Turn, finished off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置。直路彎受擠迫。衝刺尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, wider turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 300M, made little progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 自第九檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。入直路時走較外疊。直路早段未能望空，跑過三百米處後望空，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear, 2 wide, angled out after passing 500M, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 起步後不久與對手互相觸碰，居後列，走第二疊。跑過五百米處後向外移出。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上追前甚多，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W6W) Sat towards to rear 3 wide, stayed on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W6W) 居後列，走第三疊。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W3W5W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the outside, commenced move approaching 450M, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W3W5W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，走外疊。趨近四百五十米處時開始上前。入直路時走大外疊。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Sat rear, traveled keenly, made some ground over the last 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居後列。搶口。最後二百米略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W3W) Mid division, commenced move out wide 900m out, chased leaders into home straight, sustained run to lead over 200m out, ran on well and only beaten narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 居中間位置。九百米處開始上前，走外疊。入直路時追趕領先馬匹。持續追前，二百米處取得領先。走勢良佳，僅以短距離落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W3W) Began well, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, no clear run early in straight, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，走內疊。趨近五百米處時向外移出。直路初未能望空。衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍，僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Sat worse than midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。轉直路彎時向外移出。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Sat handy, gave ground inside 200M, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居前列。二百米處墮退。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Dropped in from wide draw, raced in last pair, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘，向內移入。居最後兩位。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Bumped out of stalls, raced in rear, dropped to last place entering home straight, made up several places final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 出閘時被碰撞，居後列。入直路時墮居包尾位置。最後三百米追前數位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 留居後列，落後約六個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Sat at the rear, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 居後列。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Stumbled early and soon behind, well adrift of rest of field before halfway, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;早段失蹄，瞬即墮後。半程前遙遙落後馬群。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W) Raced on rail at rear early. Made progress on the inside in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W) 早段於馬群後列貼欄位置競跑。直路上沿跑道內側上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Dropped in from wide draw, keen mid-race, pushed along over 500m out, no response to pressure, eased when well held 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘後移入內疊。中段搶口。五百米處受推策。對催策毫無反應，二百米處落後甚遠時收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, switched to chase leaders 600m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。六百米處轉換跑線以追趕領先馬匹。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (4W2W2W3W) Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, made minor headway in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(4W2W2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Settled midfield one off, showed some progress final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W4W) Made contact with the right side of its starting gate on jumping, taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out 500M, 9 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W4W) 躍出時觸碰閘廂右側，留居後列，走內疊。五百米處向外移出。入直路時落後九個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, driven 500m out, bumped and lost balance 400m out, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。五百米處受催策。四百米處被碰撞及失去平衡。所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Pressed leader, chased leader into home straight, dropped away quickly final 200m.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬。入直路時追趕領放馬。最後二百米迅速墮退。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Bumped start, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, took the lead 350M, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 起步時發生碰撞，居前列，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。三百五十米處取得領先。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Chased leader, pushed to front 200m out, no extra and headed final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 追趕領放馬。受推策，二百米處取得領先。最後五十米再無餘力，被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W3W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, limited response when asked.
(Lost right front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W3W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。對催策反應平平。
（失去右前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) On jumping made contact with the left side of its starting gate and lost ground, taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 躍出時觸碰閘廂左側及失地，留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約五個馬位。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (3W2W) Sat towards rear, raced keenly rounding the Turn, no clear running between 350M to 250M, closed off fairly.
(Sustained a small laceration to the left front leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a small laceration to the left front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(3W2W) 居後列。轉直路彎時搶口。三百五十米處至二百五十米處之間未能望空。末段衝刺一般。
（左前腿輕微割傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Slow to begin, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made good progress final 200M to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 出閘緩慢，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路早段未能望空。最後二百米追前頗多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, shifted right in home straight, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 自大外檔出閘，墮居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。直路上向內斜跑。末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Ridden forward from moderate start to within 2L of pace along the rail, shifted slightly further back to share 4th from 900M out, weakened out of contention inside final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 出閘普通，受催策上前，落後領放馬不逾兩個馬位，走內欄。其後再略為墮後，自九百米處起並列第四位。最後三百米轉弱，再無爭勝之力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Sat towards the rear, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled midfield, raced wide with cover, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走外疊，有遮擋。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Sat midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。走勢不俗。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Moderate start, recovering in midfield when checked and lost position 1100M out, towards rear on rail rounding home bend but saved ground into straight, faded under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 起步普通。恢復走勢，居中間位置，千一米處勒避及失位。轉直路彎時居後列，走內欄。入直路時走內欄節省腳程。末段在催策下力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W1W1W1W) Showed good speed to get across, set strong pace, kicked final bend, stayed on well, headed by winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W1W1W1W) 展現甚快前速以切入，以快步速領放。直路彎加速，保持佳勢，接近終點時被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 起步普通，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路早段向外移出。末段以穩勢衝刺。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Caught 3 wide no cover off pace, taken wider rounding the Home Turn, gave ground soon after. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居領放馬之後，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。轉直路彎時移出更外疊，其後瞬即墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, weakened passing 200M (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 在催策下帶頭。走勢尚可。跑過二百米處時轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W1W2W3W) Slowly away, raced 2 wide towards rear, wider turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W1W2W3W) 出閘緩慢，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時走更外疊。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, found rail 900M, 2 wide from 500M, showed good response in straight, hit the front 100M, kept on well to hold off the challengers. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W) 躍出時發生碰撞，早段居中間之前位置，走第二疊。九百米處移入內欄。自五百米處起走第二疊。直路上對催策反應良佳，一百米處取得領先。保持佳勢，力拒對手的挑戰取勝。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Jumped only fairly, raced keenly, angled out at the Turn, minor progress made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，搶口。直路彎向外移出。其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, commenced move out wide 600m out, under pressure 400m out, stuck to task, checked close home and lost all chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。六百米處開始發力，走外疊。四百米處受催策，持續力拼。接近終點時勒避，再無爭逐機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Sat handy 2 wide, raced keenly, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 居前列，走第二疊。搶口。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W6W) Settled midfield, traveled fairly, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W6W) 居中間位置。走勢一般。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W4W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W4W) 出閘普通，居中間稍前位置，走第二疊。五百米處向外移出。直路初對催策反應平平。二百米處未能再增速。其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W3W) Jumped only fairly, sat midfield, made steady progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置。其後穩步上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Mid-division, ridden along over 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 居中間位置。三百米處受催策，未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Amongst leaders, shifted one back to share 3rd coming onto home bend, remained 3-wide into straight, kept on before weakening under pressure inside final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居領先馬群之中。開始轉直路彎時留後一個馬位，並居第三位。入直路時保持走第三疊。保持走勢，最後二百五十米在催策下轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W3W) Bumped out of stalls, mid division, keen middle stages, driven along 500m out, ran on well final 200m, just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W3W) 出閘時與對手互相碰撞，居中間位置。中段搶口。五百米處受催策。最後二百米以佳勢上前，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Shifted out and bumped exiting stalls, rail position in mid-field, short of room early in home straight, not best of runs final 200m but ran on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘時向外斜跑，與對手互相碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。直路早段空位不足。最後二百米未能完全望空，但走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W) Sat towards rear, held up at the Turn, responded nicely when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W) 居後列。直路彎受困。對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Crowded start, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W3W) Chased leader, switched for clear run final bend, quickened early in home straight to lead 200m out, headed close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W3W) 追趕領放馬。直路彎轉換跑線以望空。直路早段加速，二百米處取得領先。接近終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the outside, 5 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made some progress in straight to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，落後約五個馬位，走外疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上略為追前，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Waited with in rear from wide draw, pushed along widest 600m out, never on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 自外檔出閘後居後列，留力候上。六百米處受推策，走最外疊。從未能與領先馬匹一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, still in last place top of home straight, switched for clear run 250m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W2W) 自大外檔出閘後墮居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。二百五十米處轉換跑線以望空。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W3W4W) Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走外疊。入直路時落後約三個馬位。直路初對催策反應平平，最後一百米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 450M, 3-1/2L back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，走內疊。跑過四百五十米處後向外移出。入直路時落後三個半馬位。末段衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W4W5W) Began only fairly, raced at rear on the outside, still well back on turn, failed to make any progress in straight, finished tailed out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W4W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走外疊。直路彎仍遙居於後。直路上毫無進展。大敗而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W1W) Sat last, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W1W) 居包尾位置。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W2W) Bumped leaving stalls, raced in touch with leaders, ridden on bend to chase leaders, unable to secure clear run in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎在催策下追趕領先馬匹。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W2W) Raced in rear after awkward start, good headway final bend and moved smoothly into contention top of home straight, unable to sustain.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘笨拙，居後列。直路彎追前甚多。直路初順利發力上前。後勁不繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W) In rear after crowded at start, had to wait for run top of home straight, switched wide for clear run 100m out, unlucky.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列。直路初須等待空位出現。一百米處移出外疊以望空。敗在欠運。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Held up last, race keenly throughout, pushed along widest into home straight, made up some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 留居包尾位置。沿途搶口。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W6W) Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W6W) 留居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前甚多，跑獲季軍，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Crowded and checked leaving stalls, in rear, rail position throughout, unable to quicken in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘時受擠迫及勒避。沿途居後列，走內欄。直路上未能增速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Made contact at start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 起步時發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空，二百米處望空。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W2W) Waited with in rear, unable to secure clear run until 250m out, stayed on well but ran out of time.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W2W) 居後列，留力候上。未能望空直至二百五十米處。保持佳勢，但為時已晚。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Settled rear, held up for clear running in the early Straight, made steady ground (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 居後列。直路初受困而未能望空，以穩定走勢上前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Dropped out from wide draw, some headway on bend, short of room early in home straight, effort 200m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。直路彎略為追前。直路早段空位不足。二百米處發力。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Waited with towards rear, driven along 400m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 居後列，留力候上。四百米處受催策，速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 400M, made some progress in straight to take a place, no threat to the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。四百米處向外移出。直路上略為追前，跑獲季軍，未能威脅頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, dropped away quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。末段迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, tight for room early in home straight, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。直路初受緊迫，未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, headway halfway out, switched wide for clear run top of home straight, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。半程時上前。直路早段移出外疊以望空。末段未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, same margin back on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 自外檔出閘普通，落後領放馬三個馬位，走內疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路早段對催策反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, short of room early in home straight, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, ran on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路初空位不足，未能望空直至二百米處。末段走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊，最後二百米衝刺強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled midfield, traveled only fairly, gave ground inside 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走勢僅屬一般。二百米處墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat outside the lead, gave ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側。直路上墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W3W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 出閘普通，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped start and unbalanced, raced 2 wide towards rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 起步時被碰撞及失去平衡，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Crowded and impeded shortly after leaving stalls, held up, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 出閘後不久受擠迫及受阻礙，留後。直路初仍居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W5W) Average to begin, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W5W) 起步普通，居中間位置，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段對催策反應平平。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat on pace, weakened notably inside 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居前列。最後三百米顯著轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, challenged leaders on bend, bumped and lost balance 250m out, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎挑戰領先馬匹。二百五十米處被碰撞，失去平衡。所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in rear of mid-field, keen 1000m out, pushed along into home straight, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。一千米處搶口。入直路時受推策。保持走勢，但未能增速以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out 500M, made good progress early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。五百米處向外移出。直路初追前甚多。一百米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W3W) Shifted out abruptly and bumped at start, three wide in rear with cover, ridden along to hold position on bend, faded final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W3W) 起步時急促向外斜跑及發生碰撞，居後列，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎受催策以保持位置，最後一百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W4W) Bumped on jumping, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd on line, just beaten by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W4W) 躍出時被碰撞，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。衝刺強勁，過終點時取得亞軍，僅以一馬頸位落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W1W1W1W1W) Raced in rear, ridden along 800m out, soon lost touch final 700m, finished tailed out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W1W1W1W1W) 居後列。八百米處受催策。最後七百米瞬即被拋離，包尾大敗而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W2W4W) Jumped with them, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W2W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後七至八個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W4W) Driven along and outpaced early stages, pushed along wide into home straight, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W4W) 早段受催策，但未能跟上步速。入直路時受推策，走外疊。末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W3W) Away with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間稍前位置，走第二疊。入直路時走第三疊。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W5W4W4W) Out wide in rear, ridden 700m out, pushed along widest into home straight, hung right but ran on well final 300m to close on winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W5W4W4W) 居後列，走外疊。七百米處受催策。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。內閃，但最後三百米走勢良佳，追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W4W3W5W) Wide throughout, mid-field, stayed on and some headway home straight, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W4W3W5W) 居中間位置，沿途走外疊。直路上保持走勢及略為追前。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W4W4W5W) Out in line, raced 4 wide with cover behind midfield, no cover from 800M, 4 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W4W4W5W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間之後位置，走第四疊，有遮擋。自八百米處起沒有遮擋。入直路時落後四個馬位，衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, taken wider 900m out, pushed along 500m out, weakened quickly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。九百米處移出更外疊。五百米處受推策。最後二百米迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, no extra final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段保持佳勢，最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W2W3W4W) Out in line, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W2W3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走外疊。直路彎略為追近。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W2W2W) Awkward start, wide in rear without cover, commenced move out wide 1100m out, pressed leader 700m out, no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W2W2W) 出閘笨拙，居後列，走外疊，沒有遮擋。千一米處開始上前，走外疊。七百米處追迫領放馬。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W2W2W) Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide, 3/4L back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 出閘笨拙，落後四分三個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速。最後一百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W1W) Set strong pace, joined by rivals 400m out and soon ridden, headed 200m out, sticking to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 以快步速領放。四百米處被對手追上，瞬即受催策。二百米處被超越。其後持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, headed near 600M, 2nd on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。接近六百米處時被超越。直路彎居第二位。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Jumped well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on outer, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。沿途沒有遮擋。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W1W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, detached from 500m out, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W1W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。自五百米處起被拋離。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Sat last, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 居包尾位置。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, struggled to hold position final bend, outpaced and left behind final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎難以保持位置。最後二百米未能跟上步速，被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Sat worse than midfield, had difficulty obtaining clear running in the early Straight, failed to respond (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置。直路早段難以望空。對催策毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Began only fairly, given a waiting ride at the rear 6-7Ls back, gave limited response when asked, raced in restricted room final 100M and not ridden out. (Jockey - better suited by stepping back up in distance.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，落後六至七個馬位，留力候上。對催策反應平平。最後一百米在窄位競跑，未能被力策。（騎師表示，坐騎增程回師較長途程應較合發揮。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Held up last, blocked off when going for run 400m out, clear run final 150m, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 留居包尾位置。四百米處在試圖取位之際受困。最後一百五十米望空，但未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Dropped out from widest draw, had to wait for run turning into home straight, switched for clear run 300m out, some late gains.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。三百米處轉換跑線以望空。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Waited with in rear, headway halfway out against rail, stayed on for pressure in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。半程時上前，走內欄。直路上在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Waited with towards rear, switched inside for clear run top of home straight, ran on strongly final 300m, just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初移入內疊望空。最後三百米衝刺強勁，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Dropped out from widest draw, still plenty to do top of home straight, ran on well final 200m, tight of room 100m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍落後頗遠。最後二百米走勢良佳，一百米處空位不足。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Settled behind midfield, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 起步時向外斜跑，與對手互相觸碰，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初對催策反應平平。最後二百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Settled in mid-field, unable to hold position by halfway, bumped 300m out, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。半程起未能保持位置。三百米處與對手互相碰撞。最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled towards the rear, in similar position turning for home, ran home only fairly. Never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居後列。轉直路彎時位置相若。末段衝刺僅屬一般。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Waited with in rear, pushed along 500m out, ran green, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。五百米處受推策，走勢稚嫩，超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Slowly away, held up, driven along 500m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘緩慢，留後。五百米處受催策。毫無表現。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by The Autumn Sun from Miss Super Quick, a daughter of Rock Hard Ten. Horses by the same sire include Sky Jewellery and Vivacious Win. This fellow was given six trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished sixth under the whip, beaten by 9-1/2Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. He's not looking like a first-up winner here.
formguide.comments_chi: 「秋陽」(The Autumn Sun)之後，在港同父馬包括「首飾天空」及「隨緣得勝」等駒，生母出自Rock Hard Ten。抵港後試閘六次。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段居中，末段鞭策下跑第六名，落後頭馬9.5個馬位。不似能一出即勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Sat 3 wide behind midfield, closed off well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W3W) Bumped leaving stall, held up, plenty to do top of home straight, angled out at 300m line, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W3W) 出閘時發生碰撞，留後。直路初落後甚遠。三百米處向外移出。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Slowly away, held up, headway up inside rail over 300m out, no further impression final 100m, short of room closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，留後。三百米處沿欄追前。最後一百米再無表現。末段空位不足。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Jumped awkwardly and slowly away, in rear, minor headway late, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘笨拙及緩慢，居後列。末段略為追前。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W) From wide draw given a waiting ride towards the rear 3-wide, had 6Ls to make up 400M, closed off fastest and not far behind the minor placegetters.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W) 自外檔出閘，留力待上，居後列，走第三疊。四百米處落後六個馬位。末段衝刺最快，落後入位馬匹不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back turning in, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。入直路後持續走內疊，略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Sat behind midfield, closed off fairly, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置。末段衝刺一般，對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled midfield, traveled fairly, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走勢一般。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Settled behind midfield 2 wide, only one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。在催策下僅能保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Taken back from gate 13, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 自第十三檔出閘，留居後列，落後五個馬位，走外疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) In rear, still plenty to do 400m out, stayed on, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居後列。四百米處仍落後甚遠。保持走勢，以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W3W) Began well, raced better than midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。直路彎略為追近。直路初未能再加速。最後一百米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W1W1W) Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead and set a fast tempo, led by 5Ls in the middle stages, still led by 2-1/2Ls turning in, peaked and headed 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前，以快步速領放。中段領先五個馬位。入直路時仍然領先兩個半馬位。二百米處未能再增速，被超越。其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (4W4W3W5W) Sat handy, hung out badly throughout, tailed out, no contention (Unacceptable Performance and Racing Manners, Must BT, See Incident Report).
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(4W4W3W5W) 居前列。沿途嚴重外閃。包尾大敗而回。從未參與競逐。（表現及走勢均難以接受。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Bounded on jumping, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 躍出時向上跳躍，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分三馬位。三百米處未能再增速，被超越，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly. Shifted out and bumped at the start, sat on pace on the rail, weakened final 150m, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，向外斜跑及被碰撞，居前列，走內欄。最後一百五十米轉弱，從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (1W1W) Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，受催策上前領先。入直路時領先半個馬位。三百米處未能再增速及被超越。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast(-) (1W1W) Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 1050M, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Blood in the mouth.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速(-)(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居前列。一千零五十米處取得領先。入直路時領先一個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但最後一百五十米不敵頭馬。（見競賽事件報告。）
（口內有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (3W3W) Sat behind the lead, hung out rounding the Turn, making the Turn wide, failed to finish off (Unacceptable performance and racing manner, Must BT, See Incident Report).
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(3W3W) 居領放馬之後。轉直路彎時外閃，走外疊。衝刺乏力。（表現及走勢均難以接受。須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Ridden along from the inside barrier to lead, stuck on to feature into the top 3.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第二檔出閘，在催策下領放。持續力拼，跑入季席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Bumped leaving stalls, tracked pace out wide without cover, taken wider into home straight, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時移出較外疊。所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(-) (2W2W) Raced prominently, unable to stay with winner 300m out, no extra final 150m and lost two places.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(-)(2W2W) 居前列。三百米處未能跟上頭馬。最後一百五十米再無餘力，失去兩位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Mid-field, ridden along 400m out, stayed on final 200m, unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 居中間位置。四百米處受催策。最後二百米保持走勢，但未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, no clear run early in straight, cleared approaching 100M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 起步時向內斜跑，被碰撞，居中間稍前位置，走第二疊。直路初未能望空。趨近一百米處時望空。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) From the widest draw switched off and sat 3 deep with cover at the rear, switched wide for home, made up decent late ground (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 自最外檔出閘，收慢留居後列，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時移出外疊。末段追前頗多。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W) Sat off pace, closed off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W) 居領放馬之後。衝刺不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (2W1W1W1W) Bumped out of stalls, set strong pace, headed top of home straight, bumped and lost balance 250m out, well beaten.
(Lost right hind plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 出閘時與對手互相碰撞，以快步速領放。直路初被超越。二百五十米處被碰撞，失去平衡。所負甚遠。
（失去右後蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped awkwardly, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, peaked 300M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘笨拙，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，在跑道中央競跑。三百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Sluggish start, settled in rear of mid-field, forced to steady on heels 550m out, left behind home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘緩慢，居中間之後位置。五百五十米處被迫收慢避開他駒的後蹄。直路上被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, unable to quickened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。末段未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Never better than midfield, soon faded after straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 從未超越中間位置。入直路後瞬即力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along wide into home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走外疊。末段略為追前，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Began only fairly, raced at rear on the outside, 5 lengths back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd, nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路上追前甚多，跑入亞席，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Settled in last few from a poor draw, baulked for a run after straightening until 300M out, only passed well-beaten runners.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘後居最後數位之內。入直路後受困直至三百米處。僅能超越已洩氣潰敗的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Began moderately but soon picked up on rail to midfield, remained similar into straight, kept on until finding no extra inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘普通，但瞬即沿欄加速上前，進佔中間位置。入直路時仍居相若位置。保持走勢，直至最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, made some ground in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Settled behind midfield 2 wide, stayed on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Mid-field, stayed on final 200m, unable to reach winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。最後二百米保持走勢，未能追上頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Settled well behind on rail and waited with, snuck closer on the inside after straightening but ran out of room from 300M out and forced to check and stumbled over 100M out, never recovered.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 遙居於後，留力候上，走內欄。入直路後在內疊追近，但自三百米處起空位不足。一百米處被迫勒避，失蹄，從未恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, taken back to race at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Hampered soon after start, held up in last pair, headway up inside rail final 150m, never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 起步後瞬即受阻礙，留居最後兩位之內。最後一百五十米沿內欄追前。從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Sat worse than midfield, picked off weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。末段超越已轉弱的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Tracked pace, made contact with rival when improving on bend, challenged from top of home straight, unable to sustain effort and faded final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬。直路彎推進時與對手互相觸碰。自直路初起受挑戰。最後一百五十米後勁不繼及力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (2W3W) Settled at the rear, stayed on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(2W3W) 居後列。保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, pushed along on bend to chase leaders, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路彎受推策以追趕領先馬匹。保持走勢，但速度不足以追及領先馬匹。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W5W) Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide at rear, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W5W) 自第十檔出閘，留居後列，走第三疊。入直路時走大外疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W) Crowded start, raced 2 wide towards rear, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能望空，二百米處望空，末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Sat at the rear, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 居後列。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W) Sat towards rear, traveled strongly, made ground from the back.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W) 居後列，走勢強勁。末段自後列追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W2W2W) Average to begin, raced better than midfield on outer early, moved closer 1150M, 2nd in the middle stages, peaked 350M, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W2W2W) 出閘普通，早段居中間之前位置，走外疊。一千一百五十米處略為追近。中段居第二位。三百五十米處未能再增速，直路初轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Soon took up running setting a steady pace, gained 1L advantage shortly after straightening, unable to sustain effort and outsprinted inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 瞬即以平穩步速領放。入直路後不久領先一個馬位。最後一百米無以為繼，被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(+) (2W2W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, kept on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(+)(2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) From wide draw went forward to chase leader along the 2-path, didn't finish as well as his rivals from 300M, weakened 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘，上前追趕領放馬，走第二疊。自三百米處起衝刺不及對手。一百五十米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from draw 1, set pace and led the field until 300M, battled on latter stages to finish a non- threatening 4th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，以偏快步速領放直至三百米處。末段力拼，取得第四名，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, tight for room turning into home straight, clear run 300m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。轉入直路時受緊迫。三百米處望空。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Tracked pace, moved smoothly into contention top of home straight, sticking to task, lost second on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。直路初順勢上前挑戰。持續力拼。過終點時失去亞席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Settled in front of midfield, raced wide, ran on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間之前位置，走外疊。走勢不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Began awkwardly and made heavy contact, raced better than midfield on rail, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, bumped 200M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，與對手互相大力觸碰，居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路早段未能望空。二百米處發生碰撞。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (1W1W) Reserved in midfield along the fence 3-4Ls back, in similar position turning home, ran on well final 300M, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(1W1W) 沿欄留居中間位置，落後三至四個馬位。轉直路彎時居相若位置。最後三百米以佳勢上前。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, tracked pace out wide, improved to press leader 900m out, ridden 400m out, weakened final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 出閘時向外斜跑，被碰撞，跟隨領放馬，走外疊。上前，九百米處追迫領放馬。四百米處受催策。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, dropped to rear into home straight, some late gains but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。入直路時墮居後列。末段略為追前，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Waited with towards rear, still in last place top of home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初仍居包尾位置。末段略為追前，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, challenged up rail from 400m out, strong run to lead 100m out, won going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。自四百米處起沿欄展開挑戰。走勢強勁，一百米處取得領先。帶離勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped exiting stalls, raced in touch with leaders, unable to hold position by 600m out, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘時發生碰撞，緊隨領先馬匹。六百米處未能保持位置。洩氣潰敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W1W) After 100m raced very awkwardly, became unbalanced and hung left, lost considerable ground in the process and quickly tailed off.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W1W) 跑了一百米後走勢非常笨拙，失去平衡及外閃，因而失地甚多，瞬即居包尾位置。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped on jumping, trapped very wide early, a length or so back, 2 wide from 900M, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 躍出時發生碰撞，早段落後約一個馬位，走大外疊。自九百米處起走第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路早段未能再增速，最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Settled handy, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居前列。對催策毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, still in last place entering home straight, checked 300m out, some late gains.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時仍居包尾位置。三百米處勒避。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Tracked leaders, taken wider 500m out, short-lived challenge top of home straight, faded final 200m.
(Lost right hind plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。五百米處移出較外疊。直路初一度展開挑戰。最後二百米力竭。
（失去右後蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久被碰撞，居中間稍後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上未能望空。

formguide.comments_eng: New Zealand PPG, a 4-year-old gelding, by Wyndspelle, who also sired Not Usual Pick, from Foxy Brahma, a daughter of Darci Brahma. This fellow was given nine trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat not far behind the pace and finished fifth under the whip, beaten by 6-1/4Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 25. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「風嘯莊」(Wyndspelle)之後，另一匹在港同父馬為「非凡之選」，生母出自「達先寶馬」(Darci Brahma)。抵港後試閘九次。最近6月25日出試田泥1200米，早段落後領先馬匹不遠，末段鞭策下跑第五名，落後頭馬6.25個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W3W) Stayed close enough in the group chasing leaders, quickly beaten turning home and dropped away.
(Blood in trachea and continuous epiglottic entrapment.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Blood in trachea and continuous epiglottic entrapment.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W3W) 居於追趕領先馬匹的馬群中，保持落後不遠。轉入直路時迅速洩氣，墮退。
（氣管有血及會厭持續被覆蓋。）
runnerrecords.healthissue_chi: （氣管有血及會厭持續被覆蓋。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Sat box seat, held up in the Straight, made good late ground once in the clear.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居包廂位置。直路上受困，末段望空後追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked pace against rail, had to wait for run 400m out, quickened between rivals to lead 250m out, soon clear.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。四百米處須等待空位出現。二百五十米處在對手之間加速，取得領先。瞬即帶離對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W4W) In touch with leaders, hung left early on, under pressure 300m out, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹，早段外閃。三百米處受催策，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Pressed leader, ridden 400m out, weakened final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 追逼領放馬。四百米處受催策。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Began well from the widest draw, tracked leaders on the outside, no cover throughout, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，跟隨領先馬匹，走外疊。沿途沒有遮擋。耗力太多，直路初轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Settled midfield, raced tight in the early Straight, one pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間位置。直路初緊迫競跑，保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W) Across from wide draw to race outside of leader, stayed prominent until 200m out, faded.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W) 自大外檔出閘後切入內疊，居領放馬外側。保持居前列直至二百米處。其後力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Waited with towards rear, pushed along wide into home straight, short-lived effort top of home straight, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時受推策，走外疊。直路初一度發力。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Raced in rear, had to wait for run turning into home straight, headway up rail final 200m, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。最後二百米沿欄上前。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Away well, positioned 2 wide in midfield in the early stages, slightly dropped towards rear after passing 600M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, showed no response in straight, eased final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘迅速，早段居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過六百米處後略為墮居後列。轉入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上對催策毫無反應。最後一百米收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Began awkwardly and bumped, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, dropped towards rear gradually after passing 700M, 6-1/2L back turning in, weakened and eased early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，與一駒互相碰撞，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。跑過七百米處後逐漸墮居後列。入直路時落後六個半馬位。直路初轉弱及收慢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Chased leaders along the inside, fought hard under top weight to stay in contention passing 400M, no extra late stages and faded to finish 5th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 追趕領先馬匹，走內疊。負頂磅下於跑過四百米處時力拼，保持爭逐機會。末段再無餘力，力弱，以第五名過終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W4W) Mid-field, wide throughout, weakened 400m out, soon well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W4W) 居中間位置。沿途走外疊。四百米處轉弱，瞬即落後甚遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (2W1W) Sat on pace, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
(Jockey dropped whip at 100M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(2W1W) 居前列，走勢不俗。末段走勢平穩。
（於一百米處騎師跌掉馬鞭。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Raced wide towards rear, pushed along entering home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 居後列，走外疊。入直路時受推策。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Sat outside the lead, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居領放馬外側。直路上轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Sat on pace 2 wide, nothing in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 居前列，走第二疊。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Sat midfield on the rail, stayed on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 居中間位置，走內欄。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W3W) Crowded at start, mid division, good headway halfway out, unable to quicken in home straight, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W3W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間位置。半程時追前甚多。直路上未能加速。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Mid-field, pushed along to make ground turning into home straight, soon unable to sustain effort, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。轉入直路時受推策以追前。瞬即無以為繼，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Waited with towards rear, still in rear top of home straight, some late gains.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初仍居後列。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Towards rear after sluggish start, headway wide bend, stayed on for pressure, encouraging debut.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 出閘緩慢，居後列。直路彎追前，走外疊。在催策下保持走勢。初出表現令人鼓舞。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Sat towards the rear on the rail, made no ground
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。末段未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Waited with, clear run up rail and good headway from top of home straight, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 留力候上。自直路初起沿欄望空，追前甚多。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, settled midfield, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stayed on steadily but no threat to front two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。保持穩勢，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W4W) Mid-field, wide into home straight, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W4W) 居中間位置。入直路時走外疊。保持走勢，但速度不足以展開挑戰。
