runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Dragged back to near last from an awkward draw, came from well back with 6Ls to make up at the 400M and made some inroads.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自最外檔出閘，留居接近包尾位置。自遙遙落後的位置追前，四百米處落後六個馬位。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W2W) Sat midfield on the rail, angled out near the 250M, made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。接近二百五十米處時向外移出。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Sat midfield 2 wide, raced keenly, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。搶口。末段對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Sat at the rear on the rail, picked off some weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。超越數匹已轉弱的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Bumped on jumping, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W4W) Began well from a poor draw, gradually shifted backward to worse than midfield, commenced move on top of home bend over 500M out, ran on from 3L back into straight to snatch victory final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W4W) 自第九檔出閘迅速，逐漸留後至中間之後位置。直路彎早段五百米處開始上前。入直路時落後三個馬位，其後追前，最後數步獲得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped well but soon taken over 2L back to 5th, fought on steadily along the rail but without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，但瞬即留後逾兩個馬位，居第五位。沿欄以穩勢力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W) Tracked leader, hard ridden top of home straight, maintained position until no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W) 跟隨領放馬。直路初受力策。保持位置，直至最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W3W) Began well from a trickly gate, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W3W) 自第九檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Three wide in mid-field, pushed along 700m out, short of room from 350m out to 200m out, lost all chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。七百米處受推策。三百五十米處至二百米處之間空位不足。再無爭逐機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Slowly away, recovered to race in mid-division, shuffled back on bend, made up some ground home straight, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，其後恢復走勢，居中間位置。直路彎墮退。直路上略為追前。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Mid-field, stuck to inside rail, under pressure over 300m out, unable to quicken, weakened final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，固守內欄。三百米處受催策，但未能加速。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W5W) Began only fairly from the widest draw, raced in midfield but trapped wide, no cover throughout, dropped towards rear approaching 500M, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W5W) 自最外檔出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走外疊。沿途沒有遮擋。趨近五百米處時墮居後列。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) In rear, pushed along from top of home straight, some late headway, lacked pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居後列。自直路初起受推策。末段略為追前，但速度不足以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Tracked pace, unable to quicken home straight and left behind by winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。直路上未能加速，被頭馬拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W1W1W) Sat at the rear on the rail, made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, showed no response early in straight, weakened and eased final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 起步時向外斜跑，居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路早段對催策毫無反應。最後二百米轉弱，收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Dropped out last from wide draw, still plenty to do top of home straight, making ground when severely checked 250m out, one paced after.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘後墮居包尾位置。直路初仍落後甚遠。追前，二百五十米處大力勒避，其後保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Sat off midfield 3 wide, one pace when asked. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。在催策下保持同速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W2W) Crowded start, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, a bit closer on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off strongly to snatch victory in a ding-dong finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W2W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間稍後位置，走內疊。直路彎略為追近。直路初向外移出。衝刺強勁，在叮噹馬頭下險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (2W2W3W) Only broke fairly, recovered to sit worse than midfield, closely off strongly without threatening the first three.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(2W2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，恢復走勢，居中間之後位置。衝刺強勁，但未能威脅三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Never better than midfield, found nothing in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 從未超越中間位置。直路上再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Sat towards rear, traveled fairly, minor progress made when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 居後列，走勢一般。在催策下略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began awkwardly and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，被碰撞，居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上追前甚多，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Waited with in rear, had to wait for run turning into home straight, unable to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。未能展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W4W4W5W) Raced towards the rear, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W4W4W5W) 居後列。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (3W3W3W5W) Average to begin, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, very wide turning in, showed no response early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Have a heart condition.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(3W3W3W5W) 出閘普通，居中間稍後位置，走第三疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路初對催策毫無反應。其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（心臟有問題。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (2W3W3W4W) Mid-field, keen early, wide from before halfway, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(2W3W3W4W) 居中間位置。早段搶口。半程前開始走外疊。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W4W) Soon taken well back from a wide barrier travelling mainly 4-wide without cover, made headway towards rear inside the 850M, one of the widest into straight, ran home one-paced while hanging out under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W4W) 自外檔出閘後瞬即留居遙遙落後的位置，大多走第四疊，沒有遮擋。八百五十米處略為追前至後列。入直路時為走最外疊的馬匹之一。末段保持同速，在催策下外閃。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W5W) Bumped start, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W5W) 起步時被碰撞，居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, pressed leader, quickly lost place early in home straight, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞。追迫領放馬。直路初迅速失位。最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W2W2W) Sat outside lead, kept on until weakened final 100M. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W2W2W) 居領放馬外側。保持走勢，直至最後一百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (5W1W1W) Made contact shortly after start, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 700M, sat right behind the leader on turn, bumped near 250M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(5W1W1W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居前列，走內疊。接近七百米處時讓對手超越。直路彎緊隨領放馬。接近二百五十米處時發生碰撞。以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W3W) Settled in front of midfield, traveled smoothly, switched out rounding the Turn, responded nicely under whip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W3W) 居中間之前位置，走勢順暢。轉直路彎時向外移出。對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W2W) Pressed leader, under pressure and unable to stay with that rival 300m out, weakened.
(Made a respiratory noise.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W2W) 追迫領放馬。三百米處受催策，但未能跟上對手，轉弱。
（發出呼吸聲。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W) Sent forward to lead, kept on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W) 受催策上前領放。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Ridden to the front briefly before taken over 2L back to 3rd 900M out, became 4th some 4L back 600M out, kept on early in straight before swamped inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 受催策，一度帶頭，其後留後逾兩個馬位，九百米處居第三位。六百米處居第四位，落後約四個馬位。直路初保持同速。最後一百米被後上馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, kept on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。末段保持一般走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Sat outside the lead 2 wide, one pace when asked. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側，走第二疊。在催策下保持同速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Raced in touch with leaders against rail, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, sticking to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。未能望空直至二百米處，持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W1W1W) Mustered pace and worked to cross and lead, toughened it out well only overhauled by first two final stages, improved effort.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W1W1W) 在催策下加速以切入領放。以佳勢力拼，僅於末段被首兩名馬匹超越。表現有進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped awkwardly, settled in mid-division and never far off from pace, gave limited response when asked 400M. Not reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘笨拙，居中間位置，從未遠離領放馬。四百米處在催策下反應平平。未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, ran on nicely to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。走勢良佳，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(+) (3W1W1W) Started well and across from wide draw to make running, headed 150m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(+)(3W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，切入領放。一百五十米處被超越，其後再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked approaching 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段保持佳勢。趨近二百米處時未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Settled one back in 2nd after beginning from a wide draw, came under pressure in home straight and overhauled inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘後居第二位，落後一個馬位。直路上受催策。最後一百米被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W) Jumped awkwardly but travelled keenly in front narrowly, obtained rails run onto home bend but lost advantage narrowly into straight, re-gained lead under pressure inside the 200M only to be swamped final few strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W) 出閘笨拙，搶口，但以短距離領放。開始轉直路彎時移入內欄，但入直路時失去領先優勢，以短距離落後。二百米處在催策下重奪領先，僅於最後數步被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start, raced prominently on the inside, allowed rival to cross near 700M, 1-1/2L back turning in, finished off strongly, led close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，居前列，走內疊。接近七百米處時讓對手過頭。入直路時落後一個半馬位。衝刺強勁，接近終點時領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length, peaked and headed near 300M, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時被碰撞，受催策上前領先。領先一個馬位。接近三百米處時未能再增速，被超越。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, under pressure early in home straight, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
(Lame in left front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路初受催策。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。
（左前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Took up running over 1000M out setting a sound pace and led until weakened over 350M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 一千米處取得領先，以快步速領放。保持領先，直至三百五十米處轉弱。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Maurice from Complete Finish, a daughter of Makfi. Horses by the same sire include Ping Hai Comet and Northern Beast. This fellow was given five trials in Hong Kong for one win. He shared the lead and won under slight pressure, by 3/4L, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on April 27. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished ninth under pressure, beaten by 5-1/4Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「滿樂時」(Maurice)之後，在港同父馬包括「平海之星」及「北海盜」等駒，生母出自「馬勁飛」(Makfi)。抵港後五次試閘得一勝。4月27日出試從化草地1000米，早段並頭領放，末段稍騎下以0.75個馬位之先勝出。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段居中，末段力策下跑第九名，落後頭馬5.25個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled worse than midfield, raced ungenerously in the early and middle stages, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置。早段及中段走勢欠順。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Mid-field, ridden when short of room and switched 300m out, unable to quicken and little impression after.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。三百米處受催策時空位不足，轉換跑線。其後未能增速，無甚表現。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; Soon behind and detached after sluggish start, trailed field throughout, well beaten.
(Made a respiratory noise during the running of the event.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Made a respiratory noise during the running of the event.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;起步緩慢，其後瞬即居後列，被拋離。沿途尾隨馬群。所負甚遠。
（在陣上發出呼吸聲。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Rear of mid-field, outpaced from halfway, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置。自半程起被拋離。所負甚遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W) Mid-division, no impression under pressure early in home straight, weakened quickly 200m out, eased final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間位置。直路初在催策下毫無表現。二百米處迅速轉弱。最後一百米收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat midfield, limited response when asked, never a danger.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。對催策反應平平。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Sat at the rear near the outside rail, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;居後列，靠近外欄競跑。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Away awkwardly and always at rear, detached in the last 300M, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;出閘笨拙，全程居後列。最後三百米被拋離。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped awkwardly, ended up at rear, came under pressure 600M,soon weakened and finished tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘笨拙，居後列。六百米處受催策。瞬即轉弱，包尾大敗而回。（表現難以接受。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Settled handy, raced wide and without cover, weakened over the concluding stages (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走外疊，沒有遮擋。末段轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, sat right behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居領放馬之後，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Jumped ok and settled slightly worse than midfield, made minor progress final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘尚可，居中間稍後位置。最後一百五十米略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Shifted out at start and bumped, raced at rear on the stands' side, made no progress final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;起步時向外斜跑，被碰撞。居後列，靠近外欄競跑。最後四百米毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Jumped awkwardly, sat rear, unbalanced near the 600M, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘笨拙，居後列。接近六百米處時失去平衡。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W4W) Raced very wide throughout in rear of mid-field, ridden top of home straight, faded final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W4W) 居中間之後位置，沿途走大外疊。直路初受催策。最後二百五十米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Tracked pace, stuck to inside rail, weakened under pressure final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，固守內欄。最後三百米受催策，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Tracked leaders, ridden 300m out, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處受催策。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, rear of mid-field towards centre of course, effort 400m out, made up some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘時向外斜跑，與對手互相觸碰，居中間之後位置，靠近跑道中央競跑。四百米處發力。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Behind early after slow start, in mid-division by halfway, short of room when trying to improve 350m out, stayed on once clear final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘緩慢，早段居後列。半程前居中間位置。三百五十米處在嘗試推進之際空位不足。最後二百米望空後隨即保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Moderately away, positioned a length behind the leader, hard ridden from 400M, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;出閘普通，落後領放馬一個馬位。自四百米處起受力策。二百米處未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Bumped on jumping, raced behind midfield on the middle track, made some progress after passing 300M, peaked on run 150M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;躍出時與對手互相碰撞，居中間之後位置，在跑道中央競跑。跑過三百米處後略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Sent forward to lead, kept on until weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 受催策上前領放。保持走勢，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Always thereabouts settling one back on rail behind leader cum eventual winner over 800M out, fought on under pressure but unable to quicken to threaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 沿途居啣接位置。八百米處落後領放馬兼頭馬一個馬位，走內欄。在催策下力拼，但未能加速以構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Jumped well, ridden along to lead, traveled comfortably, led all the way to score (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速。受催策，取得領先，走勢暢順。一放到底，取得勝利。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Began well, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, 3 to 4 lengths back in the middle stages, passed some tired runners final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，靠近外欄競跑。中段落後三至四個馬位。最後四百米超越部分已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (1W1W1W) Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 1-3/4L behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬一又四分三個馬位，走內疊。直路彎居相同位置。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W) Tracked leading pair, weakened 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W) 跟隨領先兩駒。二百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Made contact at start, raced slightly better than midfield on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時發生觸碰，居中間稍前位置，在跑道中央競跑。趨近三百米處時受力策。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W) Settled well back from the widest barrier, ran on steadily down the centre of the track inside final 300M to reach 4th late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W) 自最外檔出閘，遙居於後。最後三百米在跑道中央以穩勢上前，末段取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Mid-field, tight for room briefly 250m out, stayed on at the one pace.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 居中間位置。二百五十米處一度受緊迫。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, driven along 550m out, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。五百五十米處受催策，未能推進上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W1W2W) Held up in last pair after hampered early, still well back entering home straight, looked green, little impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W1W2W) 早段受阻礙，其後留居最後兩位之內。入直路時仍遙居於後。看來走勢稚嫩，無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Prominent early, gradually taken backward reaching 11th on top of home bend, awkward on heels 700M out, dropped further behind into straight, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 早段居前列。逐漸留後，直路彎早段居第十一位。七百米處緊貼對手後蹄處於窘境。入直路時進一步墮後。以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W4W) Mid-field, pushed along and dropped to rear bend, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W4W) 居中間位置。直路彎受推策及墮居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘時向外斜跑及發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W) Made running, pressed on 400m out, headed 200m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W) 帶頭競跑。四百米處受催策。二百米處被超越。再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W6W) Held up, last and wide into home straight, stayed on final 200m, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W6W) 留後。入直路時居包尾位置，走外疊。最後二百米保持走勢。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Away awkwardly, quickly recovered to be 3rd tucked in the trail, had difficulty obtaining clear passage over final stages, unable to be fully tested, excusable.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，迅速恢復走勢，居第三位，緊隨對手。末段難以望空。未能全力施為。落敗情有可原。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L, easy lead to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放，領先一又四分一馬位。直路彎前從容領放。直路早段保持佳勢。接近二百米處時未能再增速，被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled handy, traveled comfortably, responded nicely when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居前列，走勢暢順。對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Started well and prominent towards centre of course, faded from halfway.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘迅速，在跑道中央居前列。自半程起力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Tracked pace against inside rail, chased winner from 300m out, unable to quite match that rival but stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 沿欄跟隨領放馬。自三百米處起追趕頭馬。末段未能追上頭馬，但保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W2W) Mid-field, good headway between horses to challenge 200m out, responded well and on top final 50m, cosy winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W2W) 居中間位置。二百米處在馬匹之間以佳勢上前展開挑戰。對催策反應良佳，最後五十米取得領先。從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W1W) Waited with, still in rear top of home straight, stayed on final 200m, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W1W) 留力候上。直路初仍居後列。最後二百米保持走勢，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Settled towards the rear on the rail, made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 居後列，走內欄。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Amongst leaders briefly from a wide draw and soon taken back to wide in last few, carried wider into home straight, made no further impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 自外檔出閘，一度居領先馬匹之間，瞬即留後至最後數位之內，走外疊。入直路時被帶出更外疊，其後再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W4W) Began only fairly and made contact, positioned 5 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out 500M, same margin back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W4W) 出閘僅屬一般及發生觸碰，落後領放馬五個馬位，走內疊。五百米處向外移出。入直路時落後相同距離。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, dropped to midfield on turn, 3 lengths back turning in, weakened early in straight, eased inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎墮居中間位置，入直路時落後三個馬位。直路早段轉弱，最後二百米收慢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped well from draw 2 to be chasing leader along the fence, weakened quickly passing 300M. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 自第二檔出閘迅速，追趕領放馬，走內欄。跑過三百米處時迅速轉弱。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W4W4W) From widest draw unable to cross runners on its inside and raced very wide without cover in midfield for the majority of the race, fought on steadily final 300M to finish a non-threatening 5th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W4W4W) 自最外檔出閘，未能超越內側馬匹，大部分途程居中間位置，走大外疊，沒有遮擋。最後三百米持續力拼，取得第五名，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W3W) Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, tracked pace out wide without cover, effort 400m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W3W) 出閘時向外斜跑，被碰撞。跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。四百米處發力。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W4W) Bumped shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W4W) 起步後不久與對手互相碰撞，居中間之後位置，走外疊。沿途沒有遮擋。耗力太多，直路初轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W4W) Dropped back to a rearward spot after the jump, driven along 500M, closed off steadily down the outside but had too much to make on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W4W) 出閘後墮居後列。五百米處受催策。末段在外疊以穩勢衝刺，但落後領先馬匹太遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Travelled mainly 3-wide in midfield, slightly worse and wider rounding home bend, fought on steadily under pressure inside final 300M until hampered 50M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 大多居中間位置，走第三疊。轉直路彎時略為墮後，走更外疊。最後三百米在催策下持續力拼，五十米處受阻礙。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Jumped with them, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Sat outside lead, kept on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 居領放馬外側。保持一般走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速，最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Sat on pace 2 wide, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走第二疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W) Pushed to a forward position just outside leader, struggled to keep up entering home straight, weakened away badly to finish last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W) 受推策佔取前列位置，在領放馬外側競跑。入直路時難以跟上對手。嚴重轉弱，包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped ok and sat midfield one off, failed to find extra gear to close off his first race in Hong Kong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 在港首次上陣。出閘尚可，居中間位置，走第二疊。末段未能加速以展開衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Shifted out at start and made contact, positioned a length behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, peaked on run 400M, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時向外斜跑及發生觸碰，落後領放馬一個馬位，走外欄第三疊。四百米處未能再增速。最後二百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Made contact shortly after start, raced at rear, 5 lengths back at 400M, made minor progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步後不久發生觸碰，居後列。四百米處落後五個馬位。其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Sent forward to lead, ran on strongly to score. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 受催策上前，取得領先。走勢強勁，勝出賽事。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W2W2W) Ridden along to share outside lead, traveled reasonably well, weakened passing 200M (Disappointing Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W2W2W) 受催策，並排領先，走外疊。走勢不俗。跑過二百米處時轉弱。（表現令人失望。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W1W) Broke well from wide draw and across to make running, headed by winner 200m out, no extra final 100m and just held second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W1W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，切入以領放。二百米處被頭馬超越。最後一百米再無餘力，僅保住亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Prominent and wide early stages, just over 3L back rounding home bend, tired noticeably in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 早段居前列，走外疊。轉直路彎時落後稍逾三個馬位。直路上已疲態畢呈。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W3W2W) Began only fairly from the widest draw, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W3W2W) 自大外檔出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置，走第三疊。沿途沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Settled towards the rear 2 wide, made minor late ground. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 居後列，走第二疊。末段略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W3W) Shifted out at start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W3W) 起步時向外斜跑，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再加速。最後一百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W4W) Sat towards the rear 2 wide, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W4W) 居後列，走第二疊。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W3W) Soon taken well behind from the widest barrier, commenced move inside the 600M to be 3-wide rounding home bend, kept on at the one pace in the run to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W3W) 自大外檔出閘，瞬即留居遙遙落後的位置。六百米處開始發力。轉直路彎時走第三疊。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, switched for clear run 400m out, weakened final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。四百米處轉換跑線以望空。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Sat worse than midfield on the rail, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled midfield, traveled fairly, hung in in the Straight (See Incident Report).
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。走勢一般。直路上內閃。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W1W) Dropped out from wide draw, some headway up rail in home straight, stayed on but never going pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W1W) 自外檔出閘，墮後。直路上沿欄略為追前。保持走勢，但從未能加速上前挑戰對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Taken back from gate 10, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back, same margin back turning in, made very good progress in straight, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 自第十檔出閘，留居後列，落後七個馬位，走外疊。入直路時落後相同距離。直路上追前甚多。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Settled in 4th about 2L off the pace, commenced move between runners entering home straight but unable to quicken under pressure throughout.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 居第四位，落後領放馬約兩個馬位。入直路時在馬匹之間開始發力，但沿途在催策下未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Mid-field, headway onto heels of leaders bend, one paced under pressure from 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。直路彎上前緊隨領先馬匹。自三百米處起在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Settled in midfield near the rail, saved ground turning in for home, improved under pressure to reach distant 2nd over 150M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，靠近內欄競跑。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程，在催策下上前，一百五十米處進佔第二位，落後頗遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Settled worse than midfield on the rail, ran on strongly for 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。走勢強勁，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (3W5W) Began awkwardly, raced keenly in a position towards the rear, swung wide for home before closing off the race mildly. (Jockey - may not have run out a strong 1400M.)
(Blood in trachea and respiratory condition.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(3W5W) 出閘笨拙，居後列，搶口。入直路時移出外疊，其後衝刺普通。（騎師表示，坐騎或未能在千四米途程上交出好表現。）
（氣管有血及有呼吸毛病。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W4W) Out with rest, raced 2 wide behind midfield, steadied near 850M, wider turning in, finished off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。接近八百五十米處時收慢。入直路時走較外疊。衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍，但未能威脅頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, closed off well to take a place, no threat to the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間稍前位置，落後約三個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。末段以佳勢衝刺，獲得季軍，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Settled in front of midfield on the rail, no clear room in the Straight, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路上未能望空。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Bumped exiting stalls, settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along 400m out, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘時被碰撞，居中間之後位置。四百米處受推策。超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W5W) Caught 3 wide no cover near midfield, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W5W) 居接近中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, keen early, ridden top of home straight, struggling.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置，早段搶口。直路初受催策，掙扎上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Waited with towards rear, still in rear top of home straight, left behind home straight.
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初仍居後列。直路上被拋離。
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Towards rear, short-lived headway 300m out, no real impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 居後列。三百米處一度追前。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (5W5W) Trapped wide with no cover throughout from gate 11, commencing forward move from 700M, had tough run and unable to finish off (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(5W5W) 自第十一檔出閘。沿途走外疊，沒有遮擋。自七百米處起開始上前。耗力太多，末段未能以勁勢衝刺。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Towards rear, good headway 300m out, no danger to winner but stayed on well to take second final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居後列。三百米處追前甚多。最後一百米保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Sat worse than midfield, raced keenly in the early stages, held up at the top of the Straight, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。早段搶口。直路初受困，末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (4W4W) Sat midfield, raced wide and without cover, gave ground quickly in the Straight (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(4W4W) 居中間位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上迅速墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Towards rear, pushed along off bend, stayed on final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 居後列。入直路時受推策。最後一百五十米保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Made contact shortly after start, raced slightly behind midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back, finished off well without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間稍後位置，落後兩至三個馬位。衝刺良佳，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (2W2W) Tracked pace, keen, tight for room 300m out, no extra final 200m.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領放馬，搶口。三百米處受緊迫。最後二百米再無餘力。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (4W4W) Jumped with them, raced at rear on the outside, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(4W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居後列，落後約八個馬位，走外疊。入直路時落後相同距離。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W) Raced in mid-division, ridden top of home straight, ran on well but no threat to winner, challenged for second but just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W) 居中間位置。直路初受催策。走勢良佳，但未能威脅頭馬，爭奪亞軍，但僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, kept on at the same pace in the early straight when asked, weakened in the last furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路早段在催策下保持同速。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide behind midfield early, found rail near 800M, angled out after passing 500M, unable to obtain clear run until 150M, kept on same pace to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Made a respiratory noise during the running of the race.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Made a respiratory noise during the running of the race.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 起步後不久發生碰撞。接近八百米處時移入內欄。跑過五百米處後向外移出。未能望空直至一百五十米處，保持同速至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）
（在陣上發出呼吸聲。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat just behind the leaders, held up early part of the Straight, ran on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居領先馬匹稍後位置。直路早段受困。走勢尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Tracked pace, took closer order from halfway but three wide, faded final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。自半程起進佔較接近位置，但走第三疊。最後二百五十米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat last 2 wide, made minor progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居包尾位置，走第二疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, some headway on bend, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。直路彎略為追前。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Slightly slow out and bumped, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, awkwardly placed near 150M, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘稍慢，被碰撞，居中間之後位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。直路初對催策反應平平。接近一百五十米處時處於窘境。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W2W) Dropped out from wide draw, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W2W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Sat rear, held up for clear running until 150M, could not be ridden out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 居後列。受困而未能望空直至一百五十米處。未能被力策。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Sat handy, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 居前列。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Mid-field, unable to quicken under pressure over 300m out, stayed on, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置。三百米處在催策下未能加速。保持走勢，但速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W4W) Sat behind midfield 3 wide, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sluggish start, rear of mid-field, no real impression under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘緩慢，居中間之後位置。受催策，但未能構成真正威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat towards the rear, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居後列。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 留居中間之後位置，走內疊。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W) Chased the lead, traveled nicely, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W) 追趕領放馬，走勢良佳。已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W2W2W) Pressed leaders on outside, one of three that raced clear to halfway, reined back into third, starting to come under pressure when severely checked 350m out, soon lost ground and eased.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W2W2W) 追迫領先馬匹，走外疊。為半程前拋離馬群的三駒之一。收慢留居第三位，其後在催策下開始發力上前，三百五十米處大力勒避。瞬即失地及收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W2W2W) Sat outside the lead, kept on well for 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側。末段保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W1W) Led or disputed lead throughout, pressed on turning into home straight, headed 100m out, no extra closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 沿途領先或爭奪領先。轉入直路時受催策。一百米處被超越。末段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W) Pressed leader, under pressure to hold position 500m out, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W) 追迫領放馬。五百米處在催策下保持位置。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, showed good response early in straight, peaked 250M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘普通，落後約兩個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段對催策反應良佳。二百五十米處未能再增速，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Across to press leader, joined by winner on bend and headed 300m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 切入追逼領放馬。直路彎被頭馬追上，三百米處被超越。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時受對手挑戰。直路早段未能再增速及被超越，最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Average to begin, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Went forward chasing leaders, in 4th place making the turn for home, soon came under pressure and finished the race off only fairly in the home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 上前追趕領先馬匹。轉直路彎時居第四位，瞬即受催策。直路上衝刺僅屬一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W4W) Tracked leaders, switched wide for clear run 400m out, stayed on well and not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。向外移出，四百米處望空。保持佳勢，所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W2W) Tracked leaders, pushed along final bend to chase leaders, stayed on well to close on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎在推策下追趕領先馬匹。保持佳勢，追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Broke well settling just off over 2L off the pace in 4th on rail, became 3L 5th into back straight but saved ground turning in for home, ran on under pressure to reach distant 2nd final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，居第四位，落後領放馬稍逾兩個馬位，走內欄。入對面直路時居第五位，落後三個馬位。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程。在催策下上前，最後數步跑獲落後頗遠的亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Three wide in mid-field, struggled to hold position on bend, left behind home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路彎難以保持位置。直路上被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Moderately away from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘普通，受催策上前，居前列，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段取得領先。保持佳勢，但接近終點時未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) From draw 14 went forward, in 3rd spot going into home turn, briefly in front 350M but couldn't hold off the first 3 finishers mid-straight, no extra late under top weight and lost 4th near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 自大外檔出閘後上前。進入直路彎時居第三位。三百五十米處一度領先，但直路中段未能抗衡三甲馬匹。在負頂磅下末段再無餘力，接近終點時失去第四位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W2W2W) In the group chasing leaders early stages, raced keenly and allowed to move closer to the pace passing 1000M, ran on same pace in the straight, lost 2nd inside 100M, weakened to 6th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W2W2W) 早段追趕領先馬匹，搶口，跑過一千米處時獲許上前追近領放馬。直路上保持同速。一百米處失去第二位，其後轉弱，取得第六名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W3W5W) Raced in rear after crowded and bumped out of stalls, headway halfway into mid-field, faded final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W3W5W) 出閘時受擠迫及發生碰撞，其後居後列。半程時追前至中間位置。最後二百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Raced keenly when being restrained for cover behind leader, in 3rd place turning home, held up for clear running 400M-50M before closing off well late to take 5th. Could have done better.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 在受約束以取得領放馬之後有遮擋的位置之際搶口。轉直路彎時居第三位。四百米處至五十米處之間受困而未能望空，末段以佳勢衝刺，跑獲第五名。本應可取得更好成績。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (4W2W2W3W) Moderately away from the widest draw, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross near 1000M, a length or so back on turn, 3 wide turning in, showed limited response in straight, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(4W2W2W3W) 自大外檔出閘普通，居前列，走第二疊。接近一千米處時讓對手過頭。直路彎落後約一個馬位。入直路時走第三疊。直路上對催策反應平平。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, challenged up rail from 200m out, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。自二百米處起沿欄展開挑戰。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Mid-field, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
(Lost left hind plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間位置。保持走勢，但未能增速以展開挑戰。
（失去左後蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, smooth headway final bend, ran on strongly to lead top of home straight and soon in command, won going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎以暢順走勢上前。以勁勢追前，直路初取得領先。瞬即控制大局，帶離對手勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W5W) Sat midfield 3 wide with cover, kept on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W5W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。末段保持一般走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to press leader, ran on well to challenge winner in home straight, just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘後受催策，追迫領放馬。直路上以佳勢上前挑戰頭馬，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (2W2W3W4W) Waited with from wide draw, keen early, headway wide final bend, stayed on, did best of those held up.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(2W2W3W4W) 自大外檔出閘後留力候上。早段搶口。直路彎上前，走外疊。保持走勢，在留後馬匹中表現最佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W1W1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。入直路後保持走內疊。衝勢良佳，跑獲亞軍，但一直落後頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W3W) Bumped start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out 450M, bumped near 250M, finished off strongly to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W3W) 起步時與對手互相碰撞，落後領放馬三個馬位，走內疊。四百五十米處向外移出。接近二百五十米處時發生碰撞。衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Tracked leaders, had to wait for run from top of home straight until 300m out, effort to chase leaders until no extra final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。自直路早段起須等待空位出現直至三百米處。在催策下追趕領先馬匹，最後五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W4W) Away in line , stayed close to leaders throughout, worked into the race well, moved up and vied for lead passing 300M, couldn't keep up with first two late but held 3rd comfortably.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W4W) 與對手同步出閘，沿途保持緊隨領先馬匹。走勢良佳，跑過三百米處時上前爭奪領先。末段未能跟上首兩名馬匹，但從容取得季席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Began smartly from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, a bit closer on turn, hit the front 200M, kept on strongly to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬兩個馬位，走內疊。直路彎略為追近。二百米處取得領先。保持勁勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Began well, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, wider turning in, kept on well in straight to make frame, always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置，走第二疊。入直路時走較外疊。直路上保持佳勢，取得第四名，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Settled in front of midfield, held up at the top of the Straight, not much response when asked (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居中間之前位置。直路初受困。對催策反應不大。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Tracked leader, driven 350m out and slightly outpaced, stayed on well and improved to hold every chance final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領放馬。三百五十米處受催策，但略被拋離。保持佳勢，最後一百米上前，已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Away with them, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步出閘，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Across from wide draw and raced outside of leader, took narrow lead 300m out, headed 200m out and no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 自大外檔出閘後切入，居領放馬外側。三百米處以短距離領先。二百米處被超越，再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 出閘笨拙及失地，居中間位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速。其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Dropped in from wide draw, struggling in rear when checked 350m out, well held after.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘，向內移入。在後列掙扎上前，三百五十米處勒避，其後落後頗遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Began awkwardly, raced at tail, 7-3/4L back turning in, taken wide in straight and made some progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居包尾位置。入直路時落後七又四分三個馬位。直路上移出外疊，略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Bumped out of stalls, raced in rear, ridden top of home straight, made up some late ground but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘時與對手互相碰撞，居後列。直路初受催策。末段略為追前，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W6W) Bumped start, raced towards rear on the outside, no cover in the middle stages, very wide turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W6W) 起步時發生碰撞，居後列，走外疊。中段沒有遮擋。入直路時走大外疊。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Jumped on terms, dropped back to race at the rear 8-9Ls back, couldn't go on in the straight. Soundly beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 與對手同步躍出，墮居後列，落後八至九個馬位。直路上未能追前。所負頗遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段略為追前，一百五十米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, kept on same pace until no clear run final 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時落後五個馬位。其後保持同速，最後五十米未能望空。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, ridden 500m out, switched for clear run top of home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。五百米處受催策。直路初轉換跑線以望空。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W2W) Slightly slow out and crowded, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide turning in, no clear run until final 150M, made some progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘稍慢及受擠迫，居中間之後位置，走內疊。入直路時走第二疊。未能望空直至一百五十米處，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled worse than midfield 3 wide, made minor progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W2W) Sat towards the rear 2 wide, made little impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W2W) 居後列，走第二疊。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Taken back from gate 9, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, moved a bit closer on turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 自第九檔出閘，留居後列，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎略為追近。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Jumped only fairly, settled at the rear early, moved closer to midfield passing 800M, held up 400M to 300M before closing off fairly. No threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，早段居後列。跑過八百米處時追近至中間位置。四百米處至三百米處之間受困，其後衝刺一般，未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Slowly away, made up some ground to race rear of mid-field, under pressure 500m out, bumped between rivals 200m out, no real impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘緩慢，略為追前以居中間之後位置。五百米處受催策。二百米處在對手之間發生碰撞。未能構成真正威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) From an awkward draw caught out on a limb, boxed on solidly considering the tough run.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 自第九檔出閘，走外疊，沒有遮擋。儘管耗力甚多，仍持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (1W2W) Crowded leaving stalls and also shuffled back around halfway, towards rear, stayed on from 400m out, moved into third 150m out, no further impression on front two closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(1W2W) 出閘時受擠迫。大約半程時墮居後列。自四百米處起持續上前，一百五十米處居第三位。末段未能進一步威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, asked for effort 400m out, stayed on but lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 緊隨領先馬匹。四百米處受催策。保持走勢，但速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Held up from wide draw, always in rear.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 自外檔出閘後留後。一直居後列。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Taken back from wide draw and raced in last pair, well held from early in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘，留居最後兩位內。自直路初起所負頗遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (1W2W) Raced 2 wide in 2nd position early. Shifted in at 900M. Kept on in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(1W2W) 早段走二疊第二位。九百米向內移入。直路上維持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Raced in touch, keen mid-race, stuck on rail and had to wait for run until 300m out, picked up well to challenge, found only winner too strong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。中段搶口。沿欄受困，須等待空位出現直至三百米處。末段以佳勢加速以展開挑戰。僅不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Sat handy, raced keenly early, traveled wide, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 居前列。早段搶口。走外疊。已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Sat midfield on the rail, ran on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。走勢尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Jumped fairly gradually improved to 2L 4th, drifted slightly backward to 4L 6th in midfield onto first bend, renewed effort 500M out shifting 4-wide to challenge into straight, held place chance until swamped inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘一般，逐漸推進至第四位，落後兩個馬位。開始轉首個彎位時略為墮居中間第六位，落後四個馬位。五百米處重新發力。入直路時移至第四疊以展開挑戰。保持入位機會直至最後二百米被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled in last few one off the rail, drifted backward rounding home bend, shifted wide for a run into straight, finished off the race well inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居最後數位之內，走第二疊。轉直路彎時墮後。入直路時移出外疊取位。最後二百米衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped awkwardly losing ground travelling keenly in last few early, tightened between runners onto home bend, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, produced good late impression inside final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙及失地，早段居最後數位之內，搶口。開始轉直路彎時在馬匹之間受緊迫。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程。最後二百五十米追前頗多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W4W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 600M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, finished off strongly, won by a narrow margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。趨近六百米處時向外移出。入直路時落後約三個馬位。末段衝刺強勁，以短距離之先獲勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Slowly away, held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, passed plenty of field but never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 出閘緩慢，留居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。超越不少對手，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, settled behind mid, no clear running in the Straight, not fully tested.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置。直路上未能望空。未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to make frame.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W) 出閘笨拙及失地，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上追前甚多，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Settled worse than midfield, could not be quickened in the Straight, not much impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置。直路上未能加速。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W3W) Waited with in rear after crowded leaving stalls, headway 300m out, hung right, one paced final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W3W) 出閘時受擠迫，居後列，留力候上。三百米處追前。內閃。最後一百五十米保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W3W) Raced rear, never traveled, eased down entering the Straight (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W3W) 居後列。沿途走勢欠順。入直路時收慢。（表現難以接受。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, held up top of the Straight, made minor progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。直路初受困。略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W3W) Moderately away from a wide draw, unable to slot in, raced 4 wide behind midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, positioned 3 wide better than midfield on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W3W) 自外檔出閘普通，未能切入內疊，早段居中間之後位置，走第四疊。跑過一千米處後略為追近，直路彎居中間之前位置，走第三疊。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Mid-field, didn't travel with much fluency, outpaced and left behind home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，走勢欠順。直路上未能跟上步速及被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Caught very wide without cover on pace, stuck on well despite the tough run.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居前列，走大外疊，沒有遮擋。儘管多走腳程，但保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Shifted out at start and bumped, raced 3 wide, 1-1/2L back, no cover throughout, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 起步時向外斜跑及被碰撞，落後一個半馬位，走第三疊，沿途沒有遮擋。衝刺良佳，取得亞軍，僅負一馬頸位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Away only fairly, from pole position settled in the box-seat trail, closed off just fairly when shaken up.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘僅屬一般，居包廂位置。末段在催策下衝刺僅屬一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Mid-division, had to angle out for a run 300m out, soon lost ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置。三百米處須向外移出取位，瞬即墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, ridden to chase leaders 500m out, lacked pace to challenge, weakened final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。五百米處受催策，追趕領先馬匹。未能增速以展開挑戰。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Made contact at start, raced at tail, 7 lengths or so back in the middle stages, passed some tired runners final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;起步時與他駒互相觸碰。居包尾位置，中段落後約七個馬位。最後四百米超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W) Began awkwardly, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W) 出閘笨拙，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Caught 3 wide in front of midfield, made little impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 居中間之前位置，走第三疊。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W3W3W4W) Began well from the widest draw, raced in midfield on the outside, peaked on turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W3W3W4W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走外疊。直路彎未能再增速，直路上未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Tracked leading pair, under pressure over 400m out, one paced, going late to take third.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領先兩駒。四百米處受催策，保持同速。末段追前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W2W) Sat outside the lead, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W) Jumped well, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross after entering the back straight, 2 lengths or so back in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘迅速，居前列，走第二疊。進入對面直路後讓對手過頭。中段落後約兩個馬位。直路初未能再增速。最後二百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (5W3W2W2W) Jumped well from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened and eased final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(5W3W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後約三個馬位。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百米轉弱及收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (5W3W2W2W) Caught 3 wide early on pace, stride forward to sit outside leader, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(5W3W2W2W) 早段居前列，走第三疊。展步上前，居領放馬外側。直路上轉弱。

raceinfo_eng.RaceName: THE HONG KONG RACEHORSE OWNERS ASSOCIATION TROPHY (HANDICAP)

raceinfo_chi.RaceName: 香港馬主協會錦標（讓賽）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。未能望空直至三百米處。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W4W) Settled towards the rear 8Ls off the pace, had some work to do 400M but failed to run on. (Jockey - didn't run out a strong 2400M and after the event was feeling the effects of a hard run.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W4W) 居後列，落後領放馬八個馬位。四百米處落後甚遠，但未能追前。（騎師表示，坐騎未能在二千四百米途程上交出好表現，賽後感覺耗力甚多。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W) Settled one from last and waited with, baulked for a run after straightening, obtained run 250M out, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W) 居尾二位置，留力候上。入直路後受困。二百五十米處取位上前。以佳勢上前，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Crowded and bumped at start, mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 起步時受擠迫及發生碰撞，居中間位置。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。保持走勢，但未能增速以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (2W1W) Prominent from a poor draw, dropped away quickly from 600M out, pulled up.
(Bled and irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(2W1W) 自外檔出閘後居前列。自六百米處起迅速墮退，收停。
（流鼻血及心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Began well travelling keenly in midfield, baulked for a run most of the straight and never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，搶口。直路上大部分途程受困。從未看似具爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Obtained running in midfield, brought wide 600M to challenge, picked up well and challenged for the lead mid-straight, just couldn't hold off winner final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。六百米處移出外疊展開挑戰。加速良佳，直路中段爭奪領先，但最後一百米未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, keen 750m out, under pressure 500m out, ran on strongly to lead 150m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。七百五十米處搶口。五百米處受催策。走勢強勁，一百五十米處取得領先。其後保持領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W) Taken well back from the widest barrier and waited with, commenced move on rail home bend saving ground for 2.5L 7th into straight, obtained clear run back on rail 200M out, ran on dourly under pressure to just fail.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後遙居後列，留力候上。直路彎開始發力，走內欄以省腳程。入直路時居第七位，落後兩個半馬位。二百米處移回內欄望空。在催策下持續力拼，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W5W) Not hurried and settled near last in early and middle stages, brought wide for home before staying on well to take 5th on testing ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W5W) 早段及中段未受催策，居接近包尾位置。入直路時移出外疊。其後保持佳勢，跑軟地取得第五名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, struggled to hold position from 500m out, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。自五百米處起難以保持位置。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W1W) Soon took up running setting a sound pace and attempting to make all, led until finding no extra inside final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 瞬即帶頭，以快步速領放，試圖一放到底。保持領先，直至最後三百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W4W) Given a waiting ride at the rear, commenced his move 550M, came closest to leaders 250M but had nothing more to offer final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W4W) 居包尾位置，留力候上。五百五十米處開始上前。二百五十米處最接近領先馬匹，但末段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W) Close enough to leaders down the back straight but got shuffled back over the home turn, ran home one paced final 400M. Never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W) 對面直路上落後領先馬匹不遠，但直路彎墮後。最後四百米保持同速。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W3W) Began slowly losing ground, gradually recovered to just behind midfield on rail, crowded between runners entering home straight, kept on steadily under pressure without quickening inside final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W3W) 出閘緩慢，失地。逐漸恢復走勢，居中間稍後位置，走內欄。入直路時在馬匹之間受擠迫。最後三百米在催策下保持穩勢，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W5W) Sat midfield 2 wide, angled out near 550M, kept on well early in the straight, ran on evenly. (See incident report.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。接近五百五十米處時向外移出。直路早段保持佳勢，末段走勢平穩。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W4W) From wide draw taken back and reserved near last, over 10Ls off leader middle stages, driven 450M and ran to the line well without troubling first few. Pleasing return after long absence.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W4W) 自外檔出閘後留居接近包尾位置。中段落後領放馬逾十個馬位。四百五十米處受催策。末段衝刺良佳，但未能威脅首數名馬匹。久休復出，表現令人滿意。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Gradually settled towards the rear, shifted wide to challenge entering straight, ran on inside final 250M without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 逐漸留居後列。入直路時移出外疊以展開挑戰。最後二百五十米上前，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Held up in 6th some 8L off the pace, lost position to 7th despite closer to pace 1000 metres out, commenced move approaching home turn 500 metres out and widest into straight, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 留居第六位，落後領放馬約八個馬位。一千米處追近領放馬，但失位，居第七位。五百米處趨近直路彎時開始發力，入直路時走最外疊。以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Obtained a position behind midfield, came under pressure middle stages, couldn't finish it off turning home. (Jockey : failed to handle the Yielding track conditions)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置。中段受催策。轉入直路時衝刺乏力。（騎師表示，坐騎未能應付黏地的場地狀況。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W2W) Held up in last few, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, obtained clear passage over 300 metres out, ran on resolutely to snatch victory final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W2W) 留居最後數位之內。轉直路彎時走內疊節省腳程。三百米處望空。末段衝刺凌厲，最後數步取得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Soon led under 10lb claimer, set slow pace early stages before quickening up halfway, was strongly pressed by eventual 2nd final 250M but held on bravely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 由獲讓十磅的見習騎師策騎，瞬即領放。早段以慢步速領放。半程時加速。最後二百五十米受亞軍馬匹以勁勢追迫，但力保勝果。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) In front early stages but was restrained to race behind leader on settling, couldn't find extra gear to challenge passing 350M, faded final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 早段居前列，其後受約束以跟隨領放馬。跑過三百五十米處時未能加速以展開挑戰，末段力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, pressed in front from 500m out, stayed on well in home straight but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。自五百米處起在領放下受追迫。直路上保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Led early stages, narrowly headed 2-wide 800M out, faded further out of contention inside final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 早段領放。八百米處被超越，落後短距離，走第二疊。最後三百米力竭，進一步墮退，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled comfortably, closed off strongly (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 在催策下領放，走勢暢順。末段衝刺強勁。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat just behind the leaders, nothing extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居領先馬匹稍後位置。末段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W) Sat handy, responded reasonably well under whip, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居前列。對鞭策反應不俗，已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Began awkwardly, sat in 3rd 4-5Ls off leader middle stages, tried hard on straightening but couldn't muster the pace to challenge first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙。中段居第三位，落後領放馬四至五個馬位。入直路時力拼，但未能加速以挑戰頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W1W2W) Settled just off the pace in 3rd on rail, some 3L off the pace in back straight and further off speed rounding home bend, commenced move into straight but unable to quicken under pressure, dropped away quickly inside final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W1W2W) 居領放馬稍後的第三位，走內欄。對面直路上落後領放馬約三個馬位。轉直路彎時落後領放馬更遠。入直路時開始上前，但在催策下未能增速。最後三百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, keen early, checked 200m out, lost all chance and allowed to coast home.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，早段搶口。二百米處勒避。其後再無爭逐機會，獲許順其自然地競跑至終點。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W4W) From draw 13 slotted into a 3-wide spot in mid-division, kept on steadily to be challenging for the lead mid-straight, peaked on its run 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W4W) 自第十三檔出閘，居中間位置，走第三疊。保持穩勢，直路中段爭奪領先。一百米處未能再增速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Settled within 3L of pace mainly in 4th, commenced move on top of home bend 650M out, gained upper hand under pressure 200M out, won cozily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 大多居第四位，落後領放馬不逾三個馬位。直路彎早段六百五十米處開始上前。二百米處在催策下取得領先，從容獲勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Soon recovered to 6th from moderate start travelling keenly at times in back straight, in similar position turning in for home, tight between runners early on, made up some late ground inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 起步普通，瞬即恢復走勢，居第六位，對面直路上不時搶口。轉入直路時居相若位置。直路早段在馬匹之間緊迫競跑，最後一百米略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W3W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, saved some grounds on the home turn, angled out in the straight to obtain clear running, finished off strongly in the final 150M, won by a short head.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W3W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上向外移出以望空，最後一百五十米衝刺強勁，以短馬頭位勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Taken back to near last on jumping from wide draw, raced keenly in middle stages, 5-6Ls off leader home turn but failed to quicken. Never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘，留居接近包尾位置。中段搶口。直路彎落後領放馬五至六個馬位，但未能加速。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, pushed along final bend to chase leaders, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路彎受推策以追趕領先馬匹。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Chased the pace on the inside, pushed along 500M to keep up the chase on leader, couldn't get any closer final 150M, lost 3rd near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 追趕領放馬，走內疊。五百米處受推策以持續追趕領放馬。最後一百五十米未能再追近，接近終點時失去第三位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W3W) Jumped with them, raced slightly behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, angled out 500M, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間稍後位置，走內疊。直路彎走第二疊。五百米處向外移出。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Settled midfield, held up rounding the Turn, one pace to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置。轉直路彎時受困。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W3W5W) Gradually settled behind midfield 2-wide from draw 12, keen when switched 3-wide no cover 1100M, made swift headway to 3L 6th slackened tempo in back straight, swung wide for home, ran on steadily to go 3rd late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W3W5W) 自第十二檔出閘，逐漸居中間之後位置，走第二疊。千一米處移至第三疊時搶口，沒有遮擋。對面直路上步速減慢時快速上前，居第六位，落後三個馬位。入直路時移出外疊。末段穩步上前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W4W4W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield in the early stages, 3 wide after entering the back straight, sent forward 900M, raced 4 wide, a length or so back on turn, finished off strongly to score. (Dead-heat winner.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W4W4W) 與對手同步躍出，早段居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入對面直路後走第三疊。九百米處受催策上前。直路彎落後約一個馬位，走第四疊。衝刺強勁，勝出賽事。（平頭冠軍。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat on pace, traveled nicely, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居前列，走勢良佳。已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W3W) Sat towards rear, traveled smoothly, made steady progress when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W3W) 居後列。走勢暢順。末段在催策下穩步追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W2W4W) Gradually settled in midfield 2-wide, became 7th early in back straight when tempo slackened, commenced move home bend swinging wide into straight, quickened well to hit the front over 150M out only to be caught at the 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W2W4W) 逐漸居中間位置，走第二疊。對面直路早段步速減慢時居第七位。直路彎開始上前，入直路時移出外疊。加速良佳，一百五十米處取得領先，僅在五十米處被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W2W3W) Shifted in at start and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out and moved a bit closer after passing 600M, 3Ls back turning in, not much room early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W2W3W) 起步時向內斜跑，發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走內疊。跑過六百米處後向外移出，略為追近。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路初空位不足，二百米處望空。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W3W4W) Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W3W4W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速，最後一百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W3W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off very strongly to score, won by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。衝刺凌厲，以一馬頸位之先勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Settled back early stages, strode forward 800M when the pace eased, taken very wide on the home turn, challenged for the lead early straight, kept battling and was only edged out to 5th late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 早段居後列，八百米處在步速減慢時展步上前。直路彎移出大外疊，直路早段爭奪領先。持續力拼，末段被超越，僅得第五名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W2W) Settled back in the field in a race being run outside of standard time, failed to run on in the home straight. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W2W) 居後列，賽事步速較標準時間為慢。直路上未能追前。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (2W2W2W2W) Not hurried early stages, dropped back to a rearward spot 5-6Ls off the pace, ran on well final 300M to be nearest at the line. Just missed out on 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(2W2W2W2W) 早段未受催策，墮退至後列，落後領放馬五至六個馬位。最後三百米走勢良佳，過終點時最為接近，僅失季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W2W2W) Settled in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, strong run final 200m to lead 50m out, won going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W2W2W) 居中間位置。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。最後二百米衝刺強勁，五十米處取得領先，帶離對手勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W) From a wide draw given a conservative ride at the rear early stages, held up on the home turn behind a weakening rival before running on well to take 3rd close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W) 自外檔出閘，早段居後列，留後競跑。直路彎時在轉弱的對手之後受困。其後以佳勢上前，接近終點時進佔第三位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Mid-division, forward move wide on bend, upsides leaders and in contention 200m out, unable to sustain effort.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。直路彎上前，走外疊。二百米處上前追逼領先馬匹，具爭逐機會，但末段無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Moderate start, towards rear in 7th early stages, improved to 5th along rail about 3L off the pace approaching home bend, saved ground turning in for home, faded out of contention inside final 150M .
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，早段居後列第七位。趨近直路彎時推進至第五位，落後領放馬約三個馬位，走內欄。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程。最後一百五十米力竭，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled midfield 2 wide, showed some dash top of the Straight, peaked at the 200M, one pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。直路初略為加速上前。二百米處未能再增速。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (3W3W) Dropped out from widest draw, still in last place top of home straight, ran on well final 200m, tight for room close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(3W3W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居包尾位置。最後二百米以佳勢上前。接近終點時受緊迫。
