runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (1W2W2W3W) From draw 1 obtained running in midfield, switched to 2-wide 1100M, driven 400M out, ran on strongly down outside to get up close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(1W2W2W3W) 自第一檔出閘後居中間位置。千一米處移至第二疊。四百米處受催策。末段沿外疊以勁勢上前，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W2W2W) Waited with in rear, still in rear top of home straight, followed winner through 200m out, ran on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W2W2W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初仍居後列。二百米處跟隨頭馬上前。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Settled just off the pace in 3rd on rail, became 4th in a similar position 700M out, commenced move on home bend 500M out stalking the leader into straight, gained upper hand under pressure 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居領放馬稍後的第三位，走內欄。七百米處居相若的第四位。五百米處直路彎開始上前，入直路時跟隨領放馬。一百米處在催策下佔得上風。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W2W3W) Waited with in rear, still in rear top of home straight, switched in for clear run 150m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初仍居後列。一百五十米處向內移入以望空。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W1W3W) Sat rear, traveled fairly, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W1W3W) 居包尾位置。走勢一般。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (1W1W1W1W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, 6-1/2L back turning in, made very good progress in straight to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(1W1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後六個半馬位。直路上追前甚多，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W2W) Jumped only fairly, settled in 5th positioned in second half of the field throughout, kept on same pace in the straight posing little threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般。沿途居後半馬群的第五位。直路上保持同速，對領先馬匹威脅不大。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Never better than mid-division of the small field, commenced move from over 2L back in 5th into straight but unable to make any impression throughout.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 在九駒中從未超越中間位置。入直路時從落後逾兩個馬位的第五位開始發力，但末段全程毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W3W) Settled midfield 2 wide, nothing extra in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。直路上再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (1W2W) Dropped out from wide draw, still in rear top of home straight, unable to reach leaders,
(Jockey dropped whip at 200M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(1W2W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居後列。未能追上領先馬匹。
（於二百米處騎師跌掉馬鞭。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W5W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W5W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W4W) Settled in last few from a poor draw and waited with, swung widest for a run into straight, responded well inside final 300M and hit the front 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W4W) 自第九檔出閘，居最後數位之內，留力候上。入直路時移出最外疊取位。最後三百米對催策反應良佳。一百米處取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, angled out rounding the Home Turn, closed off strongly, battled gamely and won.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。轉直路彎時向外移出。衝刺強勁，在力拼下勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, ridden along 500m out, headed 300m out, dropped away quickly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。五百米處受催策。三百米處被超越。最後二百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Away on terms, moved up to be tracking the pace on outside, kept up the chase on leader turning home, fought hard but was held by first two late stage. Hung on for 3rd just.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，上前跟隨領放馬，走外疊。入直路時持續追趕領放馬，但末段未能追上頭兩名馬匹。僅保住季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Ended up racing in midfield along the 3-path, soon left behind on straightening and finished tailed out. (Jockey - failed to show sufficient pace to go forward as instructed due to the ""Soft"" track conditions.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時瞬即被拋離，大敗而回。（騎師表示，由於「軟地」的場地狀況，坐騎未能展現足夠前速以如指示般上前。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Sent forward from wide draw and raced upsides leader, weakened final 200m.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘後受催策上前，追逼領放馬。最後二百米轉弱。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Slightly slow out, well there early stages before drifting back to 5th passing the 1000M, became 6th some 3L back rounding home bend, given reminders 600M out but had nothing to give in straight and checked 180M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 出閘稍慢，早段居好位。跑過一千米處時墮居第五位。轉直路彎時居第六位，落後約三個馬位。六百米處受鞭策。直路上再無餘力。一百八十米處勒避。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, sat rear, one pace to the finish (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列。保持同速至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W2W) Began well from the one draw settling just off the pace on rail, angled out approaching final turn to challenge, ran on well to hit the front momentarily before caught a stride later near the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W2W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居領放馬稍後位置，走內欄。趨近直路彎時向外移出以展開挑戰。末段走勢良佳，一度取得領先。接近終點時於最後一步被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Travelled in midfield 6-7Ls off the pace middle stages, in 4th spot throughout, couldn't improve position final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置。中段落後領放馬六至七個馬位。沿途居第四位。最後四百米未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Settled in second half of the field 4-5Ls off the pace, responded fairly on straightening and was unable to make ground on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 居後半馬群中，落後領放馬四至五個馬位。入直路時對催策反應一般，未能追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Waited with in rear, taken wide 300m out, quickened well to pass rivals and lead 150m out, kept going to line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。三百米處移出外疊。加速良佳，超越對手，一百五十米處取得領先。末段保持走勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W3W) Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, mid division, under pressure 400m out, ran on well and lost out only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W3W) 出閘時向外斜跑，與一駒互相碰撞，居中間位置。四百米處受催策。以佳勢上前，僅以短距離落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W4W) Moderately away, happy to let the speed go in midfield one off, 5Ls or so off the leader turning for home, let down sharply centre of track but just unable to pip the winner bob of the heads.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W4W) 出閘普通，放棄爭奪領先，居中間位置，走第二疊。轉直路彎時落後領放馬約五個馬位。末段在跑道中央以勁勢上前，但在叮噹馬頭下僅敗於頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (2W1W1W1W) Average to begin, raced slightly better than midfield on inner, saved ground on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on very well, won cosily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(2W1W1W1W) 出閘一般，居中間稍前位置，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路上對催策反應良佳。一百米處取得領先。保持甚佳走勢。從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (3W2W2W2W) Taken well back and waited with, commenced move entering home straight, finished off the race well inside final 150M, did best work late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(3W2W2W2W) 遙居於後，留力候上。入直路時開始上前。最後一百五十米以佳勢衝刺，末段表現最佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Waited with in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, lacked pace to reach leaders.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(3W4W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。速度不足以追及領先馬匹。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow(+) (1W1W1W2W) Sat last, stayed on fairly. (See Incident Report)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速(+)(1W1W1W2W) 居包尾位置。保持一般走勢。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W) Waited with in rear, saved ground against rail final bend, strong run to lead final 50m, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。走勢強勁，最後五十米取得領先，其後保持領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide towards rear, a bit closer on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off strongly, just beaten by a head.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘稍慢，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎略為追近。直路早段未能望空。三百米處望空，末段衝刺強勁，僅以一馬頭位之差見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W3W) Crowded and forced to steady at start, towards rear, pushed along widest top of home straight, ran on well final 200m but hung in, no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W3W) 起步時受擠迫及被迫收慢，居後列。直路初受推策，走最外疊。最後二百米以佳勢上前，但內閃。不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Held up last after slowly away, pushed along widest into home straight, hung in but ran on strongly to close on leaders, only beaten narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 出閘緩慢，留居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。內閃，但以勁勢上前，追近領先馬匹。僅以短距離見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Slightly slow out and blundered, raced at rear, 6 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘稍慢及失蹄，居包尾位置。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Three wide in rear of mid-field without cover, smooth headway on bend, tended to hang in throughout in home straight, lost balance when rider placed significant pressure to his left rein 200m out, stayed on strongly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎追前，走勢暢順。直路上沿途傾向內閃。此駒於二百米處騎師大力收緊左邊韁繩時失去平衡，其後保持勁勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Moderately away, taken back to race at rear on the inside, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, angled out early in straight, made some headway but was inclined to hang in final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 出閘普通，留居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路初向外移出。最後二百米略為追前，但傾向內閃。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, 3 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, ran home strongly and was inclined to hang in throughout final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自最外檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，落後約三個馬位，走外疊。直路彎落後相同距離。其後衝刺強勁。最後二百五十米傾向內閃。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Across to press leader, pushed along to chase leader top of home straight, weakened final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 切入追迫領放馬。直路初受推策，追趕領放馬。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (2W3W) Tracked leaders, pushed along 450m out to chase leaders, unable to match winner but stayed on steadily, lost second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。四百五十米處受推策，追趕領先馬匹。未能追上頭馬，但保持穩勢。末段失去亞席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Away in line, stayed close enough to leaders, moved up to 2nd top of straight, responded well to take lead near 200M but couldn't hold off winner final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，保持落後領先馬匹不遠。直路初上前進佔第二位。對催策反應良佳，接近二百米處時取得領先，但末段未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) From wide draw crossed to race in a 2-wide spot just off leaders, responded well leaving the bend to be challenging for the lead mid-straight, hard driven final 200M and only went down by a neck . Game in defeat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘，切入第二疊，緊隨領先馬匹。離開直路彎時對催策反應良佳。直路中段爭奪領先。最後二百米受力策，在力拼下僅以一馬頸位之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled ahead of midfield, disadvantaged by racing wide without cover throughout, responded fairly when asked in the straight and couldn't get closer to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之前位置。沿途在沒有遮擋下走外疊，不利發揮。直路上對催策反應一般。未能追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W3W) Shifted out and bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders, well placed into home straight, strong run to lead close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W3W) 出閘時向外斜跑及碰撞對手，跟隨領先馬匹。入直路時居好位。以勁勢上前，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Began well settling some 3L off the pace mainly in 5th, drifted wider into straight, ran on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘迅速，大多居第五位，落後領放馬約三個馬位。入直路時移至較外疊，穩步上前，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Impeded exiting stalls, settled in mid-field, taken wider on bend, unable to pick up for pressure from 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 出閘時受阻，居中間位置。直路彎移出較外疊。自三百米處起受催策，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (3W2W) Pressed leader, ridden along to chase leader top of home straight, stayed on well but no match for winner, just lost second.
(Lame in left hind leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(3W2W) 追迫領放馬。直路初在催策下追趕領放馬。保持佳勢，但未能與頭馬抗衡，僅失亞軍。
（左後腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W) Chased leader out wide without cover, ridden top of home straight, stayed on for pressure, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W) 追趕領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路初受催策。在催策下保持走勢，所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Up with early pace, placed under pressure home turn, was crowded and unbalanced 450M losing momentum, failed to pick up in the straight couldn't get back into contention.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 早段跟上步速。直路彎受催策。四百五十米處受擠迫及失去平衡，失去步韻。直路上未能加速，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W) Across to chase leader, struggled to hold position final bend, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W) 切入追趕領放馬。直路彎難以保持位置。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Prominent, unable to pick up for pressure from top of home straight, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列。自直路初起受催策，但未能增速。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Well there from a poor draw, gained narrow advantage very wide 1000M out, obtained 2-wide position rounding home bend and soon joined by others after straightening, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 自外檔出閘，居好位。一千米處以短距離領先，走大外疊。轉直路彎時走第二疊。入直路後瞬即被其他馬匹追上。最後二百米無以為繼及被後上馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W) Bumped at the start then bustled along to take the lead from draw 11, soon pressed by rival on straightening, lost lead nearing 200M but kept battling to hold 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W) 自第十一檔起步時發生碰撞，其後受催策，取得領先。入直路時瞬即受對手追迫。接近二百米處時失去領先位置，但持續力拼，保住季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped well, took the early lead, headed near 850M, 2nd on turn, retook the lead 300M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，早段取得領先。接近八百五十米處時被超越。直路彎居第二位。三百米處重奪領先位置。保持甚佳走勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Sent forward from wide draw and chased leader, tightened up briefly 500m out, ridden along behind leaders 300m out, stayed on to lead close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前，追趕領放馬。五百米處一度受緊迫。三百米處受催策，居領先馬匹之後。末段保持走勢，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W) Raced prominently, wandered under pressure from 300m out, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W) 居前列。自三百米處起在催策下走勢欠規矩。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Began well, raced prominently, took the lead 250M, kept on well, just able to hold off the challenger.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘迅速，居前列。二百五十米處取得領先。其後保持佳勢，力拒對手的挑戰險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, pushed along halfway out, strong run final 200m to lead close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。半程時受推策。最後二百米走勢強勁，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length in the middle stages, peaked and headed 250M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前取得領先。中段領先一個馬位。二百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Bumped on jumping, driven forward chasing leaders in a 3-wide spot without cover, checked by the riderless horse at 450M, couldn't go on in the straight. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 躍出時發生碰撞，受催策上前追趕領先馬匹，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。四百五十米處勒避鞍上無人的馬匹。直路上無以為繼。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Across to lead from wide draw after 300m, ran on well for pressure final 200m and always holding runner-up by clear margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘，跑了三百米後切入領放。最後二百米在催策下以佳勢上前，一直帶離亞軍馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Shifted out on jumping and was bumped, stayed close enough to leaders, ran on steadily final 300M but couldn't accelerate enough to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 躍出時向外斜跑及被碰撞，落後領先馬匹不遠。最後三百米保持穩勢，但加速力不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Settled in mid-field, did not get best of runs 300m out when trying to improve, stayed on for pressure final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居中間位置。三百米處嘗試推進，但未能完全望空。最後一百米在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat midfield the rail with a charmed run, held position but no pace to challenge the top three.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄，走勢暢順。末段保持位置，但未能增速以挑戰頭三名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Taken back from gate 13, raced 2 wide at rear, 5 to 6 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自第十三檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後五至六個馬位。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Jumped on terms, eased back to race in second half of the field, failed to respond on straightening. Never dangerous. (Jockey could offer no excuse for the horse's performance.)
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 與對手同步出閘，收慢留後，居後半馬群中。直路上對催策毫無反應。從未能構成威脅。（騎師未能就坐騎的表現提供任何解釋。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W) Jumped fairly from draw 1, moved up to chase leaders, had every chance turning home, couldn't sprint as well as first 2 final 200M and just lost out 3rd place in a photo finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘一般，上前追趕領先馬匹。轉直路彎時已獲機會盡展所長。最後二百米衝刺力不及頭兩名馬匹。在電眼判決下僅失去季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (5W5W) Caught 4 wide behind midfield, gave ground in the Straight.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(5W5W) 居中間之後位置，走第四疊。直路上墮退。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, ridden top of home straight, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路初受催策。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W) Held up last, still in last place top of home straight, some headway up from rail 300m out, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W) 留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。自三百米處起沿欄略為追前。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W2W) Ridden along from a wide barrier working his way up 3-wide to 2nd 800M out, came to join the leader briefly 200M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W2W) 自外檔出閘，在催策下走第三疊，八百米處進佔第二位。二百米處一度追上領放馬，但接近終點時後繼無力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Began well, taken back to race 3 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off strongly to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘迅速，留居中間之後位置，走第三疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路早段未能望空。三百米處望空，末段衝刺強勁，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W5W) Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on outer, no cover throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W5W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走外疊。沿途沒有遮擋。直路初略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, still in rear top of home straight, made up some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。直路初仍居後列。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W4W) Stayed in touch with leaders early stages when pace was very slow, drifted back to midfield halfway, wide on home turn, run ended mid-straight and weakened noticeably final stages. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W4W) 早段跟隨領先馬匹，步速非常緩慢。半程時墮居中間位置。直路彎走外疊。直路中段無以為繼。末段明顯轉弱。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Out with rest, settled 2 wide near the pace, showed good response early in the straight, not fully ridden out inside 100m due to rider's concern of the horse's action (See Incident Report).
(Mucus in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 與對手同步躍出，靠近領放馬競跑，走第二疊。直路初對催策反應良佳。最後一百米因騎師對坐騎的動作有疑慮而未受全力催策。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有痰。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Began awkwardly from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 自第一檔出閘笨拙，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段保持佳勢。二百米處未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W1W2W) Held up in midfield on rail, commenced move approaching home straight off the rail, ran on to hit the front briefly over 100M out only to be collared in final few strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W1W2W) 留居中間位置，走內欄。趨近直路時開始上前，離欄競跑。持續上前，一百米處一度領先，僅於最後數步被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Slow into stride from gate 4, ridden along early to be handy on the fence, briefly held up in the home straight, once clear picked up well to score by a narrow margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第四檔出閘緩慢。早段受催策，居前列，走內欄。直路上一度受困，望空後隨即加速良佳，險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W) In rear after hampered leaving stalls, had to wait for run early in home straight, clear 300m out, stayed on at the one pace.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W) 出閘時受阻礙，其後居後列。直路早段須等待空位出現。三百米處望空。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W3W) Slightly slow out settling in last few, bumped 400M out upon straightening, ran on steadily but unable to sustain effort close to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W3W) 出閘稍慢，居最後數位之內。入直路時於四百米處與對手互相碰撞。末段穩步上前，但接近終點時無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, settled in rear of mid-field, strong run to lead 150m out, on top from there, won cosily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 出閘時向內斜跑及被碰撞，居中間之後位置。走勢強勁，一百五十米處取得領先。其後保持領先，從容勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Shifted out at start and made heavy contact, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 起步時向外斜跑，與對手互相大力觸碰。沿途居後列。從未有力一爭。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PP, a 3-year-old gelding, by Sir Prancealot from Electric Current, a daughter of Redoute's Choice. Horses by the same sire include Glory B and Alpha Hedge. This fellow had one start in Australia for one win (a 3yo+ maiden over 1100m). He was given two trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat not far behind the pace and finished sixth under pressure, beaten by 3-1/2Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「神氣爵士」(Sir Prancealot)之後，在港同父馬包括「光輝所願」及「精算齊同」等駒，生母出自「利得精選」(Redoute's Choice)。來港前於澳洲一出一捷，該場為1100米三歲及以上從未勝出馬賽。抵港後試閘兩次。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段落後領先馬匹不遠，末段力策下跑第六名，落後頭馬3.5個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(-) (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, ridden top of home straight, headed by winner 300m out, sticking to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(-)(1W1W) 展現甚快前速領放。直路初受催策。三百米處被頭馬超越，持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W2W) Up with early pace then eased to a trailing position behind leaders, fought on one paced early straight before overrun by rivals closing stages. (Jockey - instructed to go forward as it did in a barrier trial.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W2W) 早段跟上步速，其後收慢，居領先馬匹之後有遮擋的位置。直路早段保持同速，末段被對手超越。（騎師表示，他獲指示讓坐騎如試閘時般上前。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 留居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped only fairly and raced at the back, struggled to keep up with rivals middle stages, couldn't go on final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘僅屬一般，居後列。中段難以跟上對手。最後四百米無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Prominent early stages, gradually drifted some 2L back to 4th onto course proper, came under pressure to hold place inside final the 300M, weakened steadily closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;早段居前列。跑離分支直路時逐漸墮居第四位，落後約兩個馬位。最後三百米受催策以保持位置。末段逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Ridden along to lead, unable to hold position from 400m out, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;在催策下取得領先。自四百米處起未能保持位置。遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Settled in rear of mid-field against rail, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居中間之後位置，走外欄。自四百米處起受催策，但未能加速。最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能再增速。最後三百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 600M, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 起步時發生碰撞，居後列，走第二疊。自六百米處起走第三疊。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (3W2W) Sat outside the lead, travelled keenly, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(3W2W) 居領放馬外側，搶口。直路上轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Commenced well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, took the lead 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。二百米處取得領先，保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W3W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, just beaten by a head.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，與對手互相觸碰，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時走第三疊，衝刺強勁，取得亞軍，僅以一馬頭位之差見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W) Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 250M, closed off well to take a place without threatening the first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W) 自第九檔出閘後留居包尾位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空。接近二百五十米處時望空。末段以佳勢衝刺，跑入季席，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (3W3W) Slightly slow out and crowded, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(3W3W) 出閘稍慢，受擠迫，居中間之後位置，落後約四個馬位，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上追前甚多，跑獲季軍。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) From draw 1 tracked leaders on inside but was held up for clear running over final 350M and not tested to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，跟隨領先馬匹，走內疊，但最後三百五十米受困而未能望空。未能施為至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W5W) Tracked leaders, switched wide for clear run 600m out, ran on well to lead 200m out, headed by winner 100m out and just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W5W) 跟隨領先馬匹。六百米處移出外疊以望空。以佳勢上前，二百米處取得領先。一百米處被頭馬超越，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Across to press leader, quickened early in home straight to lead 350m out, pressed by runner-up to line and just prevailed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 切入追迫領放馬。直路早段加速，三百五十米處取得領先。被亞軍馬匹追迫至終點，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Stood flat-footed on jumping and lost ground, raced in rear, ridden along 300m out, stayed on but no further impression on front two late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 躍出時四蹄滯立及失地，居後列。三百米處受催策，保持走勢，但末段未能進一步威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, driven along 500m out, tight for room early in home straight, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。五百米處受催策。直路早段受緊迫。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Held up last, pushed along 500m out, still in rear top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 留居包尾位置。五百米處受推策。直路初仍居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, forced to steady on heels 700m out, angled off rail top of home straight, ran on strongly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。七百米處被迫收慢避開他駒後蹄。直路初移離內欄。最後二百米走勢強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Bounded as stalls opened and lost ground, in rear, pushed along 500m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 開閘時向上跳躍，失地，居後列。五百米處受推策。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled towards the rear 2 wide, stayed on well to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列，走第二疊。保持佳勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (3W3W) Taken back behind midfield 3-wide with cover, soon came to challenge on straightening, ran on under pressure to hit the front about 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(3W3W) 留居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時瞬即展開挑戰。在催策下上前，約一百米處取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, found rail near 1150M, shared lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居前列。接近一千一百五十米處時移入內欄。直路彎並排領先。直路早段保持佳勢。一百米處未能再增速及被超越，保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W2W) Broke well from the one draw gradually settled just over 3L off the pace, came under pressure to challenge rounding home bend sharing 3rd briefly into straight, unable to make any further impression in the run to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，逐漸落後領放馬稍逾三個馬位。轉直路彎時在催策下展開挑戰。入直路時一度並列第三位。末段再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W3W2W4W) Obtained a handy position just ahead of midfield, close enough to the leaders home turn before driven out to take the lead near 200M, held on well from 2nd and 3rd late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W3W2W4W) 居中間稍前的好位。直路彎落後領先馬匹不遠。其後受力策，接近二百米處時取得領先。末段保持佳勢，力拒亞軍及季軍馬匹獲勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Soon took up running taking advantage of the one draw, set steady pace until joined 700M out, re-gained 1L break on straightening only to be denied 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 把握自第一檔出閘的優勢，瞬即取得領先。以平穩步速領放，七百米處被追上。入直路時重奪領先位置，帶離一個馬位。僅於最後一百米被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W3W4W) From wide draw slotted into a 3-wide spot in midfield, 4-5Ls to make up 400M, ran on steadily to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W3W4W) 自大外檔出閘，居中間位置，移入第三疊。四百米處落後四至五個馬位。末段以穩勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W2W2W) Moderately away from gate 9, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, sent forward after entering the back straight, 2 wide from 1000M, shared lead turning in, peaked and headed near 250M, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W2W2W) 自第九檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，但走外疊。入對面直路後受催策上前。自一千米處起走第二疊。入直路時並排領先。接近二百五十米處時未能再增速，被超越。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W3W4W) Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, steadied off heels near 800M, 8 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W3W4W) 留居後列，走第二疊。接近八百米處時收慢避開他駒後蹄。入直路時落後約八個馬位。衝刺凌厲，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, found daylight near 200M, finished off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空。接近二百米處時望空，末段衝刺強勁，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Shifted in at start and made contact, raced towards rear on the outside, similar position on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, kept on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 起步時向內斜跑，發生觸碰，居後列，走外疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初略為追前，一百五十米處未能再增速，保持穩勢至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back, there to turn, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，落後三至四個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Blundered after the start, settled towards the rear, 5Ls to make up 400M, stayed on steadily to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 起步後失蹄，居後列。四百米處落後五個馬位。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, challenged and every chance from 400m out, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。自四百米處起展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會，最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Away with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, bumped near 500M, no clear run early in straight, made good progress final 200M to make frame, no threat to the first few.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。接近五百米處時發生碰撞。直路早段未能望空。最後二百米追前甚多，取得第四名。未能威脅三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W5W) Taken back from gate 10, raced towards rear on the outside, 5 lengths or so back turning in, finished off very strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W5W) 自第十檔出閘後留居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約五個馬位。衝刺凌厲，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W2W) Settled in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, stayed on for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間位置。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。未能望空直至二百米處。在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, cleared after passing 250M, finished off very strongly to score. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段向外移出。跑過二百五十米處後望空。末段衝刺凌厲，掄元。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Held up last, still in last place top of home straight, switched for clear run 300m out, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。三百米處轉換跑線以望空。未能推進上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (1W2W) Reserved in a position behind midfield, picked up in good style 300M, charged home late but couldn't get past winner. Game in defeat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(1W2W) 留居中間之後位置。三百米處加速良佳。末段衝刺強勁，但未能超越頭馬，在力拼下僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (1W1W) Rail position in rear, had to wait for run turning into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m, lost out only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。最後二百米衝刺強勁，僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W2W) Four wide in mid-field, improved to chase leader 800m out to save ground, challenged and led narrowly 250m out, weakened close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W2W) 居中間位置，走第四疊。八百米處上前追趕領放馬以節省腳程。二百五十米處展開挑戰，以短距離領先。接近終點時轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W4W) Raced in rear of mid-field, keen 800m out and shuffled back, good headway from top of home straight, ran on well final 200m to close on winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W4W) 居中間之後位置。八百米處搶口，墮退。自直路初起追前甚多。最後二百米走勢良佳，追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W3W3W) Chased leader, remained prominent 900m out, switched and under pressure 500m out, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W3W3W) 追趕領放馬。九百米處保持居前列。五百米處轉換跑線，受催策。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, took the lead after passing 850M, led by 1/4L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 200M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居前列，走外疊。跑過八百五十米處後取得領先。入直路時領先四分一個馬位。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Led steadily, kept finding when challenged by rivals in the straight, couldn't hold off winner passing 150M but continued bravely to hold 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 以平穩步速領放。直路上受對手挑戰時持續力拼。跑過一百五十米處時未能抗衡頭馬，但繼續奮勇力拼，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W2W) Prominent, ridden to chase leader 500m out, struggled to hold position in home straight, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W2W) 居前列。五百米處受催策追趕領放馬。直路上難以保持位置。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W) Stepped away cleanly from barrier 9, raced prominently to be 3/4L outside the leader, stuck to the task and dug deep to fend off a late challenger.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 自第九檔出閘俐落，居前列，落後四分三個馬位，在領放馬外側競跑。持續力拼，末段力拒對手的挑戰勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, travelled smoothly to chase leaders top of home straight, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路初走勢暢順，追趕領先馬匹。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W3W) Sent forward to lead, kept on nicely, just got pass final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W3W) 受催策上前領放，保持佳勢。僅於最後五十米被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, switched and driven along to chase leaders 500m out, ran on well and just lost second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。五百米處轉換跑線及受催策以追趕領先馬匹。以佳勢上前，僅失亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, taken wider on bend, quickened early in home straight to lead 250m out, on top from there, won comfortably.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎移出較外疊。直路早段加速，二百五十米處取得領先。其後帶返終點，輕鬆勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Jumped fairly, settled further back than intended in second half of the field, raced 3-wide without cover before closing off mildly final 300M. Not reached leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘一般，居較預期為後的後半馬群之中，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。最後三百米衝刺一般。未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Jumped awkwardly, restrained to race behind midfield, taken out to a 3-wide spot 600M, kept on steadily final 400M for 3rd but was no threat to the runaway winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘笨拙，受約束，居中間之後位置。六百米處向外移至第三疊。最後四百米保持穩勢，跑獲季軍，但未能威脅遙遙領先的頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, challenged and every chance from 400m out, closed on winner but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。自四百米處起展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會。末段追近頭馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Away with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take 2nd. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能望空。二百米處望空，衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Taken back from gate 13, raced at tail, 6-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 自第十三檔出閘後留居包尾位置。入直路時落後六個半馬位。直路上追前甚多，但未能構成威脅。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Raced in touch with leaders, had to wait for run on bend, short of room from 300m out to 100m out, unlucky.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎須等待空位出現。自三百米處起至一百米處空位不足。跑來欠運。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W) Tracked pace out wide, ridden early in home straight, bumped 350m out, stayed on steadily for a clear third but no threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊。直路早段受催策。三百五十米處與對手互相碰撞。保持穩勢，在帶離餘駒下跑獲季軍，但未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, keen 1000m out, ridden top of home straight, crowded and briefly hampered 125m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。一千米處搶口。直路初受催策。一百二十五米處受擠迫及一度受阻礙。其後未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, followed runner-up through 400m out, strong run to lead 200m out, won going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。四百米處跟隨亞軍馬匹上前。衝刺強勁，二百米處取得領先，帶離勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Settled outside the lead, kept on nicely to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側。保持佳勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Sat handy, raced wide, kept on well, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走外疊。末段保持佳勢。已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Travelled keenly one-back on rail in 4th, became 3rd in similar position rounding home bend, kept on until weakened out of contention 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居第四位，落後一個馬位，走內欄，搶口。轉直路彎時居相若的第三位。保持走勢，直至一百米處轉弱，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W3W) Sat behind midfield 2 wide, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。毫無表現。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W2W) Impeded and forced to steady out of stalls, rail position in mid-field, angled out to make run 500m out, ran on well final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘時受阻，被迫收慢，沿欄居中間位置。五百米處向外移出取位。最後二百米以佳勢追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W) Soon taken across from a wide barrier for an inside run, travelled tight in rear before making steady headway home bend, came to challenge under pressure upon straightening, ran on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W) 自外檔出閘，瞬即切入內疊，居後列，緊迫競跑，直路彎穩步追前。入直路時在催策下上前挑戰。穩步上前，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W2W4W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out approaching 500M, finished off strongly to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W2W4W) 自外檔出閘後留居後列，走第二疊。趨近五百米處時向外移出。以勁勢衝刺，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (3W2W2W5W) Dropped out from widest draw, pushed along widest into home straight, tended to hang right in home straight, ran on strongly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(3W2W2W5W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。直路上傾向內閃。以勁勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Rail position in rear, blocked off when going for run in home straight, not fully extended.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。直路上在取位時受困，未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Waited with towards rear, driven 600m out, did not get best of runs in home straight?when trying to improve, unable to be ridden out to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 居後列，留力候上。六百米處受催策。直路上嘗試推進之際未能完全望空。未能被力策至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W4W) Dropped away from wide draw, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m to close on winner but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W4W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走大外疊。最後二百米以勁勢上前，追近頭馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W2W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced behind midfield on the inside, 2 wide approaching 550M, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W2W) 起步時向外斜跑，與對手互相觸碰，居中間之後位置，走內疊。趨近五百五十米處時走第二疊。末段衝刺良佳，取得亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Blundered start and bumped, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 起步時失蹄及被碰撞，居中間之後位置，落後五個馬位，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Waited with towards rear, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時受推策，走外疊。未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W7W) In rear after awkward start and lost balance, raced wide throughout, bumped 450m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W7W) 出閘笨拙及失去平衡，居後列。沿途走外疊。四百五十米處發生碰撞。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Settled towards the rear 2 wide, stayed on fairly. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 居後列，走第二疊。保持一般走勢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能望空，保持穩勢至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Taken back from gate 9, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 自第九檔出閘後留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空，末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 起步時向外斜跑，與對手互相觸碰，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Shifted out abruptly shortly after start and made contact, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, moved closer after passing 1050M, 2nd on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 起步後不久急促向外斜跑，發生觸碰，居中間之前位置，走外疊。跑過一千零五十米處後追近。直路彎居第二位。直路初對催策反應平平。一百五十米處轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Settled down 3-wide in midfield, had every chance final 400M, ran on evenly to take 6th not beaten far by first five.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。最後四百米已獲機會盡展所長。保持穩勢，取得第六名，負於首五名馬匹不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W2W) Jumped awkwardly, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 500M, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘笨拙，居中間之後位置，走內疊。趨近五百米處時向外移出。直路上未能以勁勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Hampered start, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer along the rail on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 起步時受阻礙，居後列，走內疊。直路彎略為追近，走內欄。直路早段對催策反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Caught wide no cover chasing leaders, dropped away rapidly passing 400M to be beaten nearly 20L. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 追趕領先馬匹，走外疊，沒有遮擋。跑過四百米處時迅速墮退，負於頭馬近二十個馬位。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide better than midfield, there to turn, cleared 300M, finished off well to take 2nd, always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。三百米處望空，末段衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (2W2W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, hard ridden after passing 300M, finished off very strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(2W2W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。跑過三百米處後受力策。衝刺凌厲，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W) Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, mid division, travelled smoothly into home straight, strong run to lead 150m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W) 出閘時向內斜跑及被碰撞，居中間位置。入直路時走勢暢順。以勁勢上前，一百五十米處取得領先。末段領先距離收窄，但仍保持佳勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (1W1W) Sat rear, commenced to improve from near the 800M, held up at the early Straight, closed off strongly (See incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(1W1W) 居後列。自接近八百米處起開始推進。直路初受困。衝刺強勁。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(-) (2W1W) Disputed led early stages, led outright 800m out, challenged by winner top of home straight, headed 200m out, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(-)(2W1W) 早段爭奪領先。八百米處單騎領放。直路初被頭馬挑戰。二百米處被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly losing round, soon taken across in rear and picked up to 8th 1100M out, steadied and lost position inside the 900M, snuck closer on home turn but baulked 400M out, fought on steadily to reach distant 3rd late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙及失地，瞬即切入內欄。千一米處加速推進至第八位。九百米處收慢及失位。直路彎追近，但四百米處受困。末段持續力拼，跑獲季軍，但落後頭馬甚遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Jumped moderately, recovered swiftly on rail to just over 4L back in 6th 900M out, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, fought on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，其後迅速恢復走勢，走內欄。九百米處居第六位，落後稍逾四個馬位。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程。持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Began awkwardly, raced in midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置，落後三個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空。二百米處望空，末段衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W3W) Moderately away, raced better than midfield on the inside, commenced move 650M, 3 wide turning in, took the lead 300M, kept on well but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W3W) 出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走內疊。六百五十米處開始上前。入直路時走第三疊，三百米處取得領先，保持佳勢，但最後五十米不敵首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W4W) Raced very wide throughout, mid division, pushed along 500m out, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W4W) 居中間位置，沿途走大外疊。五百米處受推策。所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W2W) Awkward start and lost ground, recovered to settle rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 600m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘笨拙及失地，其後恢復走勢，居中間位置，走內欄。六百米處移離內欄。末段在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Away well from the inside draw and trailed the leader, finished off only fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 自內檔出閘迅速，跟隨領放馬。衝刺僅屬一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (3W5W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover towards rear, a bit closer in the middle stages, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(3W5W) 自外檔出閘後留居後列，走第三疊，有遮擋。中段略為追近。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前頗多，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, there to turn, difficult to obtain clear run early in straight, cleared after passing 250M, made minor progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段難以望空。跑過二百五十米處後望空，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Dropped back to the rear on jumping from a wide draw, had a ground saving trip on the inside, had some work to do 400M, closed off fastest to finish a close 5th, nearest at the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘後墮居包尾位置，走內疊節省腳程。四百米處仍落後頗遠。末段衝刺最快，取得第五名。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide, driven 500m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊。五百米處受催策。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Sluggish start, raced in touch with leaders, well placed into home straight, one paced and unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，緊隨領先馬匹。入直路時居好位。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Settled in mid-field, forced to steady and switch 900m out, good headway on bend, sustained headway to challenge 300m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。九百米處被迫收慢及轉換跑線。直路彎追前甚多。持續上前，三百米處展開挑戰。保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Moderately away from gate 12, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 850M, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 自第十二檔出閘普通，受催策上前，居前列。八百五十米處取得領先。入直路時領先一個馬位。三百米處未能再增速及被超越。最後一百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (2W2W) Across to press leader, shifted right but quickened early to lead top of home straight, headed by winner 200m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(2W2W) 切入追迫領放馬。直路初向內斜跑，但加速，取得領先。二百米處被頭馬超越。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, good headway 800m out to chase leaders, stayed on well but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。八百米處追前甚多，追趕領先馬匹。末段保持佳勢，但不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, shifted right and challenged up rail early in home straight, closed on winner late on but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 緊隨領先馬匹。直路初向內斜跑，沿欄展開挑戰。末段追近頭馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, quickened early in home straight to lead 200m out, on top from there, hung in final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路初加速上前，二百米處取得領先。其後保持領先。最後二百米內閃。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W6W) Began awkwardly from a wide draw, in touch with leaders, wide into straight, kept on well to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W6W) 自外檔出閘笨拙，緊隨領先馬匹。入直路時走外疊。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Across to press leader, quickened early in home straight to lead 300m out, headed by winner 100m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 切入追迫領放馬。直路早段加速，三百米處取得領先。一百米處被頭馬超越，其後持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Began well from a low draw settling in midfield early, drifted slightly worse behind runners inside the 800M, steadied and became 10th rounding home bend, kept on same pace without making any serious impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 自內檔出閘迅速，早段居中間位置。八百米處在對手之後略為墮後。轉直路彎時收慢，居第十位。直路上保持同速，未能構成真正威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Shifted out at start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, showed good response in straight, took the lead 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 起步時向外斜跑，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後兩至三個馬位。直路上對催策反應良佳。一百米處取得領先。保持佳勢，但最後五十米不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Dropped out from widest draw, raced in rear, ridden top of home straight, unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 自大外檔出閘，墮居後列。直路初受催策。未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Clean jump, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, slightly improved on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, peaked and headed 50M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 出閘俐落，居中間稍前位置，走第三疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路彎略為推進。直路上對催策反應良佳，一百五十米處取得領先。五十米處未能再增速，被超越，其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, moved smoothly into contention 400m out, narrow lead 100m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。四百米處順勢上前爭勝。一百米處以短距離領先。保持佳勢，但不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W4W) Raced in touch with leaders, travelled smoothly and quickened early in home straight, strong run to lead 300m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。走勢暢順，直路初加速上前。走勢強勁，三百米處取得領先。末段領先距離收窄，但保持領放至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, checked 900m out, short of room early in home straight, forced to steady 200m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。九百米處勒避。直路早段空位不足。二百米處被迫收慢。未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (3W4W) Shifted out at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, a bit closer on turn, showed very good response in straight, took the lead approaching 150M, kept on very well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(3W4W) 起步時向外斜跑，居中間之後位置，走外疊。直路彎略為追近。直路上對催策反應甚佳。趨近一百五十米處時取得領先。保持甚佳走勢至終點，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, tight for room between horses early in home straight, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路早段在馬匹之間受緊迫。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made contact shortly after start, raced behind midfield, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久與對手互相觸碰，居中間之後位置。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。末段衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled behind midfield 2 wide, hampered when switching out on the Home Turn, made some ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路彎向外移出時受阻礙，略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Settled in last few, snuck closer though tight between runners early in home straight, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 居最後數位之內。直路早段在對手之間緊迫競跑之際追近。以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W4W) Crowded shortly after start and lost balance, settled in mid-field, pushed along widest on bend, ran on well final 200m but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W4W) 起步後不久受擠迫，失去平衡，居中間位置。直路彎在推策下走最外疊。最後二百米走勢良佳，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide turning in, no clear run early in straight, one-paced thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時走第三疊。直路早段未能望空，其後保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run early in straight, made contact near 250M, eased inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能望空。接近二百五十米處時與對手互相觸碰。最後二百米收慢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W5W) Jumped well from the widest draw, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W5W) 自最外檔出閘迅速，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Crowded start, raced towards rear on the outside, still well back on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列，走外疊。直路彎仍遙居於後。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Across from wide draw to lead, joined by rivals 600m out, headed top of home straight, stayed on well to fight back and lead 100m out, just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後切入以領放。六百米處被對手追及。直路初被超越。末段保持佳勢，一百米處反先對手取得領先，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Raced very wide throughout without cover in mid division, strong run in home straight to lead 200m out, won cosily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 居中間位置，沿途走大外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上走勢強勁，二百米處領先，從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Began only fairly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, wider turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。入直路時走較外疊。末段衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, rail position in mid-field, struggled to hold position mid-race, bumped 300m out, eased when detached 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘時與對手互相碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。中段難以保持位置。三百米處與對手互相碰撞。二百米處被?離之際收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Made contact shortly after start, positioned 2 to 3 lengths behind the leader in the middle of the track, finished off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;起步後不久與對手互相觸碰，落後領放馬兩至三個馬位，在跑道中央競跑。末段衝刺良佳，跑入亞席，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) On jumping was bumped heavily on the hindquarters and became unbalanced, raced in midfield on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 350M, took the lead 150M, kept on very well to the line, won by 2 lengths.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)躍出時被大力碰撞後軀，因而失去平衡，居中間位置，在跑道中央競跑。趨近三百五十米處時受力策。一百五十米處取得領先。保持甚佳走勢至終點，以兩個馬位之先勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段保持佳勢。二百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Shifted in and bumped leaving stalls, raced in touch with leaders, effort top of home straight, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 出閘時向內斜跑及發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。直路初發力，在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (4W3W) Shifted in and bumped leaving stalls, ridden along from stalls to track pace without cover, effort 500m out, no extra final 200m.
(Jockey dropped whip at 200M.)
(Sustained a minor abrasion to the left front leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a minor abrasion to the left front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(4W3W) 出閘時向內斜跑，與對手互相碰撞，其後受催策跟隨領先馬匹，沒有遮擋。五百米處受催策。最後二百米再無餘力。
（於二百米處騎師跌掉馬鞭失以及失去右前蹄的蹄鐵。）
（左前腿輕微擦傷。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （於二百米處騎師跌掉馬鞭失以及失去右前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W) Showed good speed to lead, quickened early in home straight and soon in command, kicked two lengths clear 200m out, won going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W) 展現甚快前速領放。直路初加速，瞬即控制大局。二百米處加速帶離兩個馬位，帶離對手勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, weakened passing 150M (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 受催策上前領放。跑過一百五十米處時轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Travelled smoothly behind leading pair, challenged over 200m out, led 125m out and comfortably on top at line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居領放兩駒之後，走勢暢順。二百米處展開挑戰，一百二十五米處取得領先，輕鬆勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Broke away swiftly and sat outside the leader, fought hard when being challenged to hold on to the victory.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居領放馬外側。末段在受挑戰之際力拼，保住勝局。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to across, pressed leader, driven along 600m out to chase leader, ran on well to edge ahead final 50m in tight finish.
(Jockey dropped whip at 350M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘後受催策，切入追迫領放馬。六百米處受催策以追趕領放馬。末段走勢良佳，五十米處取得領先，僅勝。
（於三百五十米處騎師跌掉馬鞭。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （於三百五十米處騎師跌掉馬鞭。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W2W) Shared early pace from a wide draw, drifted one back to 2nd 2-wide rounding home bend, folded up quickly inside final 400M.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘，早段並排領先。轉直路彎時墮居第二位，走第二疊。最後四百米迅速力竭。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W4W) Settled handy, traveled comfortably, raced wide and without cover, responded nicely under whip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W4W) 居前列。走勢暢順。在沒有遮擋下走外疊。末段對鞭策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat midfield, traveled only fairly, one pace to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，走勢僅屬一般。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Out in line, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, peaked on turn, weakened early in straight, eased final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎未能再增速。直路初轉弱。最後三百米收慢。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Out with rest, raced 2 wide better than midfield, hard ridden from 650M but only showed limited response, wider turning in, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。自六百五十米處起受力策，但反應僅屬平平。入直路時走較外疊。直路初轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, short of room top of home straight, checked 350m out, clear run 250m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。直路初空位不足，三百五十米處勒避。二百五十米處望空，末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (3W4W) Settled worse than behind midfield 3 wide, closed off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。末段衝刺強勁，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W4W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 400M, very wide turning in, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W4W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。四百米處開始上前。入直路時走大外疊。直路初略為追前。最後一百米再無餘力。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Taken back from gate 10, raced 3 wide behind midfield, travelled keenly in the middle stages, wider from 550M, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 自第十檔出閘，居中間之後位置，走第三疊。中段搶口。自五百五十米處起走更外疊。直路早段略為追前，一百五十米處未能再增速，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 300M, closed off well to take 2nd without threatening the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，落後領放馬三個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能望空。三百米處望空，以佳勢衝刺，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Began only fairly, taken back to race at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer after passing 1050M, angled out 500M, 4 lengths or so back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made minor progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居後列，走內疊。跑過一千零五十米處後略為追近。五百米處向外移出。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路初未能望空，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Taken back from gate 11, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, 6 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 自第十一檔出閘，留居中間之後位置，走內疊。跑過五百五十米處後向外移出。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上略為追前。

formguide.comments_eng: New Zealand PP, a 3-year-old gelding, by Proisir from Brookbars, a daughter of Bullbars. Horses by the same sire include Sunny Da Best and Flow Water Flow. This fellow had one start in Australia for one win (a 3yo+ maiden over 1450m). He was given four trials in Hong Kong for two placings. He raced handily and finished second under pressure, beaten by 2-1/2Ls, over 1200m on turf in Conghua on June 12. In the latest trial, he shared the lead and finished third under pressure, beaten by 1-3/4Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 30. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: Proisir之後，在港同父馬包括「新力好」及「細水長流」等駒，生母出自Bullbars。來港前於澳洲一出一捷，該場為1450米三歲及以上從未勝出馬賽。抵港後四次試閘兩次上名。6月12日出試從化草地1200米，早段跟前，末段力策下跑第二名，落後頭馬2.5個馬位。最近6月30日出試田泥1200米，早段並頭領放，末段力策下跑第三名，落後頭馬1.75個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, good headway on bend against rail, quickened early in home straight to lead 250m out, soon headed by winner 200m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎沿內欄追前甚多。直路早段加速，二百五十米處領先。二百米處瞬即被頭馬超越，末段持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Awkward start and head in air, held up last, some headway early in home straight, short of room close home, unable to be ridden out to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，昂首，居包尾位置。直路初略為追前。接近終點時空位不足，未能被力策至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W3W) Jumped awkwardly, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘笨拙，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W4W) Crowded and bumped shortly after start, raced in rear, wide into home straight, struggling.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W4W) 起步後不久受擠迫，發生碰撞，居後列。入直路時走外疊，掙扎上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (2W2W) Commenced well and held a more forward position than its previous starts, 6th at 400M, closed off only fairly.
(Mucus in trachea and roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居較近仗更為靠前的位置。四百米處居第六位。末段衝刺僅屬一般。
（氣管有痰及再次患有喘鳴症。）
runnerrecords.healthissue_chi: （氣管有痰及再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W4W) Moderately away, raced towards rear on the outside, 7 lengths back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘普通，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (3W4W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(3W4W) 出閘僅屬一般及與他駒互相觸碰，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上追前甚多，跑獲季軍。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Jumped nicely, sat outside the lead, kept on well to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居領放馬外側。保持佳勢，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Made all, pressed on 350m out and soon in command, kicked two lengths clear 100m out and in control, won cosily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 領放。三百五十米處受催策，瞬即控制大局。一百米處加速帶離兩個馬位，穩操勝券。從容獲勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Bumped start, raced towards rear, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 起步時發生碰撞，居後列。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after passing 500M, 4-1/2L back turning in, made some headway in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。跑過五百米處後向外移出。入直路時落後四個半馬位。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Dropped out last from wide draw, hung right under pressure 400m out, good headway final 200m, ran on strongly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 自大外檔出閘後墮居包尾位置。四百米處在催策下內閃。最後二百米追前甚多。以勁勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W3W) Made contact with the left side of its starting gate on jumping, raced at rear on the inside, moved a bit closer after passing 1000M, 2 wide from 700M, no daylight early in straight, cleared 200M, closed off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W3W) 躍出時觸碰閘廂左側，居後列，走內疊。跑過一千米處後略為追近。自七百米處起走第二疊。直路初未能望空。二百米處望空。末段衝刺強勁，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Held up after bumped out of stalls, not best of runs in home straight, not fully extended.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘時被碰撞，留後。直路上未能完全望空。未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, angled off rail 500m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。五百米處移離內欄。未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W1W) Dropped out from wide draw, some headway on bend, sustained headway in home straight but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W1W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。直路彎略為追前。直路上持續上前，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W2W3W) Settled well back on the fence, moved off the rail in the middle stages, closed off fairly over the final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 遙居於後，走內欄。中段移離內欄。末段衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Began awkwardly and made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide at rear, found rail 900M, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 出閘笨拙，其後不久發生觸碰，居後列，走第二疊。九百米處移入內欄，直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路初保持佳勢。一百五十米處時未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W3W2W4W) Jumped awkwardly, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W3W2W4W) 出閘笨拙，居中間稍前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後兩至三個馬位。直路初略為追前。一百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W4W) Taken well back from a poor draw, commenced move 3-wide rounding home bend, ran on well in straight despite not having much room at about the 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W4W) 自第十一檔出閘，遙居於後。轉直路彎時開始上前，走第三疊。直路上走勢良佳，但大約二百米處空位不足。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began awkwardly, taken back to race at rear on the inside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, unable to obtain clear run until 75M, finished off very strongly, won by a nose.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙，留居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位，未能望空直至七十五米處。末段衝刺凌厲，以一馬鼻位之先取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W2W3W) Pressed leader, under pressure 550m out to hold position, taken wider final bend, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W2W3W) 追迫領放馬。五百五十米處受催策以保持位置。直路彎移出較外疊。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Prominent, ridden turning into home straight, weakened 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 居前列。入直路時受催策。三百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W) Commenced well, raced 2 wide better than midfield early, dropped to midfield after 900M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W) 出閘迅速，早段居中間之前位置，走第二疊。過了九百米處後墮居中間位置。入直路時落後約五個馬位。直路上保持同速。
